zh.summary: ⚡ 本周金融市场遭遇多重冲击：费城半导体指数暴跌超20%正式确认进入熊市，全球芯片股三周蒸发3.3万亿美元；黄金在4000美元关口反复拉锯，华尔街分析师看空情绪创数周新高；比特币在传统市场关闭的周末成为唯一持续交易的全球风险资产，“影子市场”角色凸显；SpaceX跌破IPO发行价至123.99美元，市值较高点蒸发超万亿美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 Financial Weekend Wrap: SOX Confirms Bear Market, Gold Defends $4,000, Bitcoin's Weekend ‘Shadow Market’ Role, SpaceX Falls Below IPO
en.summary: ⚡ Weekend financial roundup: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index confirms bear market (20%+ drop from peak), global chip stocks lose $3.3 trillion; gold fights to hold $4,000 support as Wall Street sentiment turns most bearish in weeks; Bitcoin trades as the only liquid global risk asset through the weekend, playing a ‘shadow market’ role; SpaceX falls below $135 IPO price to $123.99, losing over $1 trillion from peak.

zh.title: ⚡ WAIC 2026终端大爆发：AI Agent手机三国杀、千问智能眼镜升级、Bose AI耳机首秀
zh.summary: ⚡ WAIC 2026第三日：AI Agent手机三国杀——努比亚NaviX Ultra首批3万台秒罄二手翻倍、StepX Neo搭载自研Step AOS智能体操作系统、荣耀AI Agent年内上市；千问联合Bose发布AI智能体耳机、AI眼镜升级为智能体眼镜支持第三方Skill调用；AGIBOT举办具身智能论坛，国产机器人出海提速。

en.title: ⚡ WAIC 2026 Terminal Explosion: AI Agent Phone Wars, Qwen Smart Glasses Upgrade, Bose AI Earbuds Debut
en.summary: ⚡ WAIC 2026 Day 3: AI Agent smartphone wars heat up — Nubia NaviX Ultra's first 30,000 units sell out instantly, StepX Neo launches with custom Step AOS operating system, Honor's AI agent coming this year; Qwen and Bose unveil AI agent earbuds, Qwen AI glasses upgraded to agent platform with third-party Skill support; AGIBOT hosts Embodied AI Forum, accelerates global robot exports.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日WAIC第三日：腾讯连发三大具身基座模型与小六机器人、蚂蚁灵波全栈大脑2.0发布、智元30台真机全馆服务
zh.summary: ⚡ WAIC 2026第三日：腾讯发布Hy-Embodied-VLM-1.0/RxBrain-1.0/VLA-0.5三大具身基座模型，Apexio智能体与新一带小六机器人首次完整演示；蚂蚁灵波发布全栈大脑2.0，LingBot-World 2.0世界模型实现连续1小时生成零质量衰减引爆海外开发者社区；智元机器人30+台真机全馆提供导览服务，具身智能从证明上限进入划定底线的产业竞争阶段。

en.title: ⚡ WAIC 2026 Day 3: Tencent Unveils Three Embodied AI Models and Xiao Liu Robot, Ant LingBot Launches Brain 2.0, AGIBOT Deploys 30+ Robots
en.summary: ⚡ WAIC 2026 Day 3: Tencent releases three embodied AI foundation models - Hy-Embodied-VLM-1.0, RxBrain-1.0, VLA-0.5 - alongside the Apexio persistent agent and Xiao Liu robot; Ant LingBot unveils Brain 2.0 with LingBot-World 2.0 world model achieving hour-long generation with zero quality drift; AGIBOT hosts Embodied AI Forum with 30+ robots serving across venue; embodied AI moves from proving ceilings to defining floors.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日国际政治：美军在约旦遭袭2死1失踪、CENTCOM启动第八夜报复打击、伊朗暂停谅解备忘录
zh.summary: ⚡ CENTCOM确认两名美军士兵在约旦Azraq基地遭伊朗弹道导弹袭击身亡，第三名士兵仍在搜寻中；美军随即启动第八夜连续打击，目标直指参与袭击的伊斯兰革命卫队部队；伊朗宣布正式暂停履行伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录，最高领袖哈梅内伊警告将给予美国“永生难忘的教训”；科威特首都首次因伊朗袭击实施紧急限电；国际油价单日涨超4%。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 International Politics: Two US Troops Killed in Jordan, CENTCOM Launches 8th Night of Retaliatory Strikes, Iran Suspends Islamabad MoU
en.summary: ⚡ CENTCOM confirms two US service members killed in Iranian ballistic missile strike on Jordan’s Azraq base, one remains missing; US launches eighth consecutive night of strikes targeting IRGC units; Iran formally suspends Islamabad MoU; Khamenei warns of ‘unforgettable lessons’; Kuwait City implements emergency power rationing for first time; oil surges 4%.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日金融晚报：韩国券商降级潮创年内首次、利比亚接入人民币跨境支付系统CIPS
zh.summary: ⚡ 韩国KOSPI从9,000暴跌至6,000区间，券商研报降级首次反超升级，17个交易日蒸发30%；利比亚央行签约接入中国CIPS系统，直接使用人民币进行跨境结算；全球利率大重置风暴席卷日本，10年期日债收益率创30年新高2.9%；Circle获联邦信托银行牌照，银行界警告稳定币将抽走5000亿美元存款。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 Financial Briefing: Korea Brokerage Downgrades Surpass Upgrades as KOSPI Crashes 30%, Libya Joins China's CIPS Yuan Payment System
en.summary: ⚡ Korea's KOSPI crashes 30% from 9,000 peak to 6,800 range in 17 sessions; brokerage target-price downgrades outpace upgrades for first time in 2026; Libya's central bank signs agreement to join China's CIPS cross-border payment system; Japan's 10Y bond yield hits 30-year high of 2.9%; Circle wins federal trust bank charter as banks warn stablecoins could drain $500B from deposits.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日科技综合：上海璇相发布百万级原子光镊量子芯片、苹果起诉OpenAI窃取硬件商业机密、Waymo因大停电暂停旧金山自动驾驶
zh.summary: ⚡ 上海璇相科技联合中器无量发布全球首款百万级原子光镊阵列超表面芯片，量子比特规模从万级跃升至百万级；苹果正式起诉OpenAI盗用硬件商业机密，指控两名前员工窃取iPhone工程文档与供应商信息；Waymo因PG&E大规模停电暂停旧金山Robotaxi服务，旧金山市长推动更严自动驾驶紧急规则。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 Tech Roundup: Shanghai Xuanshang Unveils Million-Level Atomic Optical Tweezer Chip, Apple Sues OpenAI Over Hardware Trade Secrets, Waymo Pauses SF Robotaxi After Blackout
en.summary: ⚡ Shanghai Xuanshang Technology and Zhongqi Wuliang unveil world's first million-level atomic optical tweezer array chip for quantum computing; Apple sues OpenAI alleging two former employees stole hardware trade secrets; Waymo pauses San Francisco robotaxi service after PG&E power outage.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日科技综合：阿里云百炼上线HappyOyster世界模型、Anthropic与Meta洽谈百亿美元算力租约、OpenAI发布Codex Micro硬件键盘
zh.summary: ⚡ 阿里云百炼正式上线开放式世界模型HappyOyster 1.0，提供Android/iOS/Web三端SDK；Anthropic与Meta就百亿美元级算力租赁展开谈判，Meta或将进军云计算；OpenAI发布首款消费级硬件Codex Micro机械键盘，专为AI编程打造。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 Tech Roundup: Alibaba Cloud Bailian Launches HappyOyster World Model, Anthropic-Meta $10B Compute Talks, OpenAI Ships Codex Micro
en.summary: ⚡ Alibaba Cloud Bailian launches HappyOyster 1.0 open world model with Android/iOS/Web SDKs; Anthropic in talks with Meta for up to $10B AI computing lease; OpenAI unveils Codex Micro, its first consumer hardware — a $230 mechanical keypad for AI coding.

zh.title: ⚡ 美伊冲突第八夜：美军战斗机首次深入伊朗腹地空袭亚兹德、伊朗预警“全面进攻”称“无政治边界安全”
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军第八晚连续空袭首次动用战斗机打击伊朗中部亚兹德，深入腹地650公里；伊朗最高领袖军事顾问发出“全面进攻”最后通牒——2-3天内若不停火将不再对等反击；伊朗正式暂停履行谅解备忘录；首次攻击沙特境内目标；科威特电力供水设施连遭两日打击，海湾合作委员会定性为“战争罪行”；霍尔木兹海峡日通行量暴跌至8艘。

en.title: ⚡ US-Iran War Night 8: Fighter Jets Strike 650 km Inland in Yazd, Tehran Threatens “Full-Scale Offensive” With “No Political Border Safe”
en.summary: ⚡ US launches 8th consecutive night of strikes, deploying fighter jets to hit targets 650 km inland in Yazd; Iran’s top military adviser issues a 2-3 day ultimatum — full-scale offensive imminent if strikes continue; Iran formally suspends MoU; strikes Saudi Arabia for first time in 3 months; Kuwait power/water plants hit for 2nd day; GCC declares attacks ‘war crimes’; Strait of Hormuz transits collapse to 8 vessels per day.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日金融早报：A股ETF月内净流入突破3200亿、18只主动ETF正式上报、长鑫科技创科创板IPO纪录、比特币周末持稳64K
zh.summary: ⚡ A股ETF 7月以来净流入超3200亿元，本周超2000亿创年内单周纪录；18只主动管理ETF正式上报，境内ETF迈入主动+被动新时代；长鑫科技科创板史上最大IPO，募资579亿估值5800亿；比特币周末持稳$64,810，CLARITY法案投票在即；苹果日本全线涨价10%，存储芯片成本与日元贬值双压。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 Financial Briefing: A-Share ETF Inflows Surpass ¥320B, 18 Active ETFs Filed, CXMT Sets STAR IPO Record, Bitcoin Holds $64,810
en.summary: ⚡ A-share ETF net inflows surpass ¥320B in July with ¥200B+ in a single week; 18 active management ETFs filed; CXMT sets STAR Market record with ¥57.9B IPO; Bitcoin holds $64,810 ahead of CLARITY Act vote; Apple hikes Japan iPhone prices 10% on chip costs and yen weakness.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日科技综合：OpenAI任命计算CTO、Capital One开源VulnHunter、GitHub发布Copilot SDK、xAI开源Grok Build
zh.summary: ⚡ OpenAI提拔Uday Ruddaraju为计算CTO，剑指全球最大算力基座；Capital One时隔七年从数据泄露受害者变身为开源AI安全工具推手，VulnHunter用反证引擎消灭半数误报；GitHub正式发布Copilot SDK，六语言原生支持，与Anthropic和OpenAI展开智能体框架三国杀；xAI开源Grok Build，Apache 2.0许可但不接受外部贡献。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 Tech Roundup: OpenAI Names CTO of Compute, Capital One Open-Sources VulnHunter, GitHub Ships Copilot SDK, xAI Open-Sources Grok Build
en.summary: ⚡ OpenAI promotes Uday Ruddaraju to CTO of Compute; Capital One transforms from breach victim to open-source AI security enabler with VulnHunter; GitHub enters agent framework war with Copilot SDK; xAI open-sources Grok Build under Apache 2.0.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日科技早报：北大神经动力学芯片改写脑机规则、智源Orca世界模型问世、OpenAI Sol Ultra攻克五十年数学猜想、Anthropic洽谈微软自研AI芯片
zh.summary: ⚡ 北大团队在Science发表全球首款基于相变忆阻器的神经动力学系统芯片，脑皮层重建较GPU提速478倍；北京智源发布悟界·RoboBrain Orca世界模型，首次实现世界状态前后演化推演；OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra以64子智能体一小时攻克50年未解图论猜想；Anthropic据报正洽谈租用微软Maia 200自研AI芯片。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 Tech Roundup: PKU Neuromorphic Chip Rewrites BCI Rules, BAAI Orca World Model, OpenAI Sol Ultra Cracks 50-Year Math Conjecture
en.summary: ⚡ Peking University publishes world's first neural dynamical system chip in Science — 478x faster vs GPU; BAAI releases Orca world model for state evolution reasoning; OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra cracks 50-year Cycle Double Cover Conjecture with 64 subagents; Anthropic reportedly in talks for Microsoft Maia 200 chips.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月19日国际政治早报：伊朗袭击约旦基地致两名美军死亡、哈梅内伊宣布备忘录作废、乌克兰379架无人机夜袭莫斯科地区
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军中央司令部确认2名美军士兵在伊朗对约旦基地的攻击中阵亡，1人失踪，为开战以来首次美军直接死于伊朗火力；伊朗最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊发表书面声明称特朗普签署的协议'毫无价值'，伊朗正式暂停履行备忘录义务；乌克兰379架无人机夜袭俄罗斯19个地区，Wildberries仓库被毁7名工人遇难；美军连续第七晚空袭伊朗扩大至基础设施；伊朗首次打击叙利亚境内美军基地。

en.title: ⚡ July 19 International Politics: 2 US Troops Killed in Jordan, Khamenei Declares Deal 'Worthless', 379 Ukraine Drones Hit 19 Russian Regions
en.summary: ⚡ US Central Command confirms 2 US service members killed and 1 missing in Iranian attack on Jordan base — first US combat deaths from direct Iranian fire; Iran's supreme leader says Trump's signature 'worthless and invalid,' Iran suspends all MoU commitments; Ukraine launches 379 drones across 19 Russian regions, Wildberries warehouse hit killing 7; US strikes Iran for 7th night targeting infrastructure; Iran strikes US base in Syria for first time.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日金融周末综述：费城半导体指数确认熊市、原油暴涨16%至88美元、比特币ETF连续四日净流入、250亿看涨期权押注7.2万美元
zh.summary: ⚡ 本周全球金融市场遭遇多重冲击：费城半导体指数暴跌20%以上确认进入技术性熊市；布伦特原油暴涨4.6%至88.10美元，单周涨幅16%创多年新高；美伊冲突第七晚持续升级，霍尔木兹海峡日通行量仅8艘；苹果盘中短暂超越英伟达重夺全球第一；Netflix暴跌7.3%、SpaceX创IPO新低；比特币ETF连续四日净流入1.32亿美元，Deribit现25亿美元看涨期权押注月底7.2万美元；E*TRADE推出现货比特币交易。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 Financial Weekend Wrap: SOX Confirms Bear Market, Oil Surges 16% to $88, Bitcoin ETF Sees 4th Day of Inflows, $2.5B Call Spread Targets $72K
en.summary: ⚡ A punishing week for global markets: Philadelphia Semiconductor Index crashes 20%+ from June peak confirming bear market; Brent crude surges 4.6% to $88.10 with 16% weekly gain; US-Iran conflict enters 7th night with only 8 vessels crossing Hormuz; Apple briefly overtakes Nvidia; Netflix drops 7.3%, SpaceX hits IPO low; Bitcoin ETFs log 4th consecutive day of $132M inflows; Deribit sees $2.5B call spread betting on $72K by month-end; E*TRADE launches spot Bitcoin trading.

zh.title: ⚡ 腾讯WAIC一次性补齐机器人、办公、出海AI全能力：具身智能全栈首秀、WorkBuddy登录鸿蒙、Hy3调用量暴增68倍
zh.summary: ⚡ 腾讯在WAIC 2026首日发布具身智能全栈方案，推出Hy-Embodied三大专用模型；WorkBuddy独立App同步登录iOS/Android/鸿蒙三端，成为业界首款覆盖鸿蒙的通用智能体应用；混元Hy3上线一周调用量暴增68倍登顶OpenRouter全球榜；腾讯云ADP 4.0海外版发布，加速企业出海AI布局；联合中国信通院发布「AI航海家+」出海智能体。

en.title: ⚡ Tencent Unveils Full-Stack Embodied AI at WAIC: WorkBuddy on HarmonyOS, Hy3 Surges 68x, ADP 4.0 Overseas Edition Launches
en.summary: ⚡ Tencent unveils full-stack embodied AI at WAIC 2026 with Hy-Embodied model trio; WorkBuddy standalone app launches on iOS, Android and HarmonyOS — first universal agent on Harmony; Hunyuan Hy3 sees 68x call volume surge in week one, tops OpenRouter; Tencent Cloud ADP 4.0 Overseas Edition debuts; AI Navigator+ launched for cross-border enterprises.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日国际政治晚报：美军第七晚空袭伊朗2死1失踪、伊朗威胁全面进攻、里亚尔崩溃至历史新低
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军中央司令部确认2名美军士兵在伊朗对约旦基地的攻击中阵亡，1人失踪，为开战以来首次美军直接死于伊朗火力；伊朗最高领袖军事顾问警告若美军持续空袭将发动全面进攻，'没有任何政治边界是安全的'；伊朗里亚尔跌至192.8万兑1美元的历史新低；哈梅内伊声明称特朗普签名'毫无价值'；美军向以色列增派加油机为扩大行动做准备；科威特发电与海水淡化厂连遭伊朗攻击。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 International: 2 US Troops Killed in Iran Strikes, Tehran Threatens Full-Scale Offensive, Rial Crashes to Record Low
en.summary: ⚡ CENTCOM confirms 2 US service members killed and 1 missing in Iranian attack on Jordan base — the first US combat deaths from direct Iranian fire; Iran threatens 'full-scale offensive' with 'no political border safe'; Iranian rial plunges to record low of 1.928M to USD; Khamenei says Trump's signature 'utterly worthless'; US sends tanker aircraft to Israel; Kuwait power and desalination plants hit for second day.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日金融晚报：费城半导体指数确认熊市、原油暴涨14%至88美元、SpaceX六连阴市值蒸发超万亿、比特币反弹至64K
zh.summary: ⚡ 美股三大指数周线齐跌，费城半导体指数较6月峰值暴跌逾20%正式确认进入技术性熊市；布伦特原油暴涨14%至88.10美元，美伊冲突致霍尔木兹海峡航运近乎瘫痪；SpaceX六连阴跌至123.99美元市值较峰值蒸发逾万亿美元；比特币反弹至64,000美元；苹果短暂超越英伟达重夺全球市值第一；长鑫科技IPO中签率0.47%创科创板纪录；A股融资余额11连降超1700亿元但强平潮未至。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 Financial Evening: SOX Enters Bear Market, Oil Surges 14% to $88, SpaceX Plunges for 6th Day, Bitcoin Bounces to $64K
en.summary: ⚡ Wall Street posts weekly losses: S&P 500 -1.6%, Nasdaq -2.9%; Philadelphia Semiconductor Index falls 20.2% from June peak confirming bear market; Brent crude surges 14% weekly to $88.10 amidst US-Iran conflict; SpaceX 6-day losing streak to $123.99, market cap down $1T+ from peak; Bitcoin recovers to $64,000; Apple briefly overtakes Nvidia; CXMT IPO sets STAR Market record.

zh.title: ⚡ AI编码工具双周进化：Anthropic发布Claude Code动态工作流1000子智能体并行、VS Code 1.128多聊天Claude代理上线、xAI推出Grok 4.5编码智能体
zh.summary: ⚡ Anthropic为Claude Code发布动态工作流功能，支持单个会话中运行最多1000个并行子智能体并内置对抗性验证层；VS Code 1.128引入多聊天Claude代理会话与Copilot Vision GA；xAI推出Grok 4.5编码智能体以Cursor训练数据为基础，定价仅为Opus 4.8的1/4但幻觉率达54%；Firefox 152与Chrome 150同日发布关键安全补丁，开发者CI环境面临手动更新压力。

en.title: ⚡ AI Coding Tools Surge: Anthropic's Claude Code Gets 1,000 Parallel Subagents, VS Code 1.128 Ships Multi-Chat, xAI Grok 4.5 at 1/4 Price
en.summary: ⚡ Anthropic releases Claude Code Dynamic Workflows with up to 1,000 parallel subagents per session; VS Code 1.128 introduces multi-chat Claude agent sessions and Copilot Vision GA; xAI launches Grok 4.5 coding agent trained on Cursor data at 1/4 the price of Opus 4.8 with 54% hallucination rate; Firefox 152 and Chrome 150 ship critical security patches simultaneously.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日WAIC收官日：阿里三箭齐发——平头哥开源SAIL剑指NVIDIA CUDA、M890超节点64卡开箱即用、秒悟团队版上线
zh.summary: ⚡ WAIC 2026最后一日：阿里平头哥正式开源AI软件栈T-Head SAIL，全面兼容260+主流框架，向NVIDIA CUDA生态发起正面挑战，真武AI芯片累计出货56万片；阿里云发布灵骏真武M890超节点实例，64卡开箱即用训练性能提升3倍，入选WAIC镇馆之宝；阿里发布秒悟团队版（Meoo Team）企业级AI应用创作平台，从个人工具升级为组织级生产力平台；Meta与Anthropic洽谈百亿美元算力租赁协议。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 WAIC Finale: Alibaba Fires Three Salvos — T-Head Open-Sources SAIL vs NVIDIA CUDA, M890 Super Node, Meoo Team Debuts
en.summary: ⚡ WAIC 2026 final day: Alibaba T-Head open-sources SAIL AI software stack challenging NVIDIA CUDA with 260+ framework compatibility; Alibaba Cloud launches Zhenwu M890 super node with 64-card compute and 3x training performance; Alibaba debuts Meoo Team enterprise AI platform; Meta reportedly in $10B compute lease talks with Anthropic.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日国际政治晚报：伊朗首次攻击沙特三个月来首见、正式暂停停火备忘录、处决2022抗议涉案囚犯

zh.summary: ⚡ 美股周五全线收跌，三大指数周线集体录得跌幅，道指跌406点纳指跌1.4%；黄金在通胀与地缘风险交织中重返4000美元上方；比特币跌破63000美元，AI恐慌蔓延至加密市场；美联储两位高官同日放鹰，Logan呼吁加息，9月加息概率升至50%；A股沪指失守3800点，超5000股飘绿。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 Financial Roundup: Wall Street Ends Week Lower, Gold Returns Above $4,000, Bitcoin Breaks Below $63K, Fed Officials Turn Hawkish
en.summary: ⚡ All three major US indices close lower for the week — Dow drops 406 pts, Nasdaq falls 1.4%; Gold bounces back above $4,000 amid inflation and geopolitical crosscurrents; Bitcoin breaks below $63,000 as AI rout spills into crypto; Two Fed officials signal rate hike support, September odds rise to 50%; China's A-shares plunge with Shanghai Composite losing 3,800 level.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日科技综述：Kimi K3引发"DeepSeek 2.0"全球芯片股暴跌、中科院发布ScienceOne Omni超越GPT-5.5、Patreon联合Cloudflare全面封杀AI爬虫
zh.summary: ⚡ 月之暗面Kimi K3 2.8万亿参数开源模型发布引发全球芯片股暴跌，费城半导体指数进入熊市，英伟达被苹果反超失去全球市值第一；中科院发布ScienceOne Omni科学AI基础模型超越GPT-5.5；Patreon联合Cloudflare从网络层主动封杀AI训练爬虫。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 Tech Roundup: Kimi K3 Triggers 'DeepSeek 2.0' Global Chip Rout, CAS Unveils ScienceOne Omni, Patreon Blocks AI Crawlers
en.summary: ⚡ Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 2.8T open-source model triggers global chip stock rout — SOX enters bear market, Nvidia loses #1 market cap to Apple; Chinese Academy of Sciences unveils ScienceOne Omni AI surpassing GPT-5.5; Patreon partners with Cloudflare to actively block AI training crawlers.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日科技综述：苹果向OpenAI 40名前员工发法律函、Anthropic与Meta洽百亿算力租约、Google NotebookLM改名Gemini Notebook、Intel 18A良率达85%
zh.summary: ⚡ Apple向OpenAI约40名前员工发送法律保全函，诉讼全面升级；Anthropic与Meta洽谈两年100亿美元算力租赁协议；Google将NotebookLM更名为Gemini Notebook向Pro用户开放代码执行；Intel 18A工艺良率突破85%，首发High NA EUV量产芯片交付客户。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 Tech Roundup: Apple Widens Legal War on OpenAI, Anthropic-Meta 0B Compute Talks, Google Rebrands NotebookLM, Intel 18A Hits 85% Yield
en.summary: ⚡ Apple escalates lawsuit against OpenAI sending preservation letters to ~40 former employees; Anthropic negotiates 0B compute lease with Meta; Google rebrands NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook; Intel 18A reaches 85% yield with first High NA EUV chip shipment.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日国际政治综述：美军连续第六夜空袭伊朗炸毁桥梁、伊朗报复打击多国美军基地、乌克兰防长被解职引发全国抗议
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军连续第六夜空袭伊朗，首次打击民用基础设施炸毁6座桥梁致7死，伊朗大规模报复打击巴林科威特卡塔尔约旦叙利亚美军基地；乌克兰防长费多罗夫被解职引发全国大规模抗议；伯纳姆正式成为英国工党领袖将于周一接任首相；墨西哥危地马拉边境7.3级地震引发海啸预警。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 International Politics Roundup: US Widens Iran Strikes to Bridges, Iran Retaliates Across Gulf, Ukraine Protests Erupt
en.summary: ⚡ US strikes Iranian bridges for sixth consecutive night killing 7; Iran launches massive retaliatory strikes on US bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Jordan, Syria; Ukraine defense minister fired triggering nationwide protests; Andy Burnham becomes UK Labour leader; 7.3 quake hits Mexico-Guatemala border.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日金融综述：全球芯片股暴跌潮延续、Netflix业绩暴雷、油价飙升至86美元
zh.summary: ⚡ 全球芯片股抛售潮持续蔓延，费城半导体指数从高点回撤20%；Netflix Q2营收不及预期，股价暴跌10%；美伊冲突第六晚，布伦特原油突破86美元；亚太股市全面重挫，日经暴跌4%；美联储副主席暗示可能加息。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 Financial Roundup: Global Chip Rout Deepens, Netflix Plunges on Earnings Miss, Oil Surges Past $86
en.summary: ⚡ Global semiconductor sell-off deepens with SOX nearing 20% correction from peak; Netflix Q2 revenue miss sends shares plunging 10%; US-Iran strikes enter 6th night, Brent crude breaks $86; Asia-Pacific markets suffer broad sell-off.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月18日科技综述：Patreon主动封杀AI爬虫、Zoox自动驾驶烟雾召回、一加宣布退出美欧
zh.summary: ⚡ Patreon联合Cloudflare从网络层主动拦截AI训练爬虫，数千次访问归零；Amazon旗下Zoox因自动驾驶出租车无法识别烟雾中的紧急消防场景发布第4次软件召回；一加正式宣布退出美国和欧盟市场，战略重心转移。

en.title: ⚡ July 18 Tech Roundup: Patreon Blocks AI Crawlers, Zoox Issues Smoke Recall, OnePlus Leaves US/EU
en.summary: ⚡ Patreon partners with Cloudflare to actively block AI training crawlers at the network level; Amazon's Zoox issues 4th software recall after robotaxi struggles with smoke-obscured fire scene; OnePlus officially confirms exit from US and EU markets.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日科技综述：OpenAI确认GPT-5.6 Sol擅自删除用户文件、Zoox自动驾驶因烟雾触发召回、GPU融资商转向推理芯片
zh.summary: ⚡ OpenAI官方承认GPT-5.6 Sol在Full-Access模式下可能擅自删除用户文件，试图覆盖$HOME环境变量时误删用户主目录；Amazon旗下Zoox因自动驾驶出租车无法识别烟雾中的紧急消防场景发布软件召回；GPU融资商Upper90向推理芯片初创General Compute提供4亿美元贷款，AI基础设施投资风向转变。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Tech Roundup: OpenAI Confirms GPT-5.6 Sol Deletes User Files, Zoox Issues Smoke-Related Recall, GPU Financiers Shift to Inference Chips
en.summary: ⚡ OpenAI officially confirms GPT-5.6 Sol can delete user files without permission in Full-Access mode; Amazon's Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi struggles with smoke-obscured emergency scene; GPU financier Upper90 provides $400M loan to inference chip startup General Compute.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日国际政治晚报：伊朗15轮反击轰炸卡塔尔美军基地、科威特电厂被毁首次断电、伊朗首炸叙利亚美军、胡塞待命封锁红海
zh.summary: ⚡ 伊朗IRGC第15轮“闪电行动”打击卡塔尔乌代德空军基地，摧毁美军远程雷达和空中加油机；科威特发电和海水淡化设施遭伊朗导弹击中引发大火，大量发电机组受损；伊朗首次在冲突中直接打击叙利亚境内目标——袭击美军坦夫基地；伊朗要求胡塞武装待命封锁曼德海峡，中东两大石油通道面临同时关闭；伊朗卫生部公布最新冲突伤亡数据：38人死亡超400人受伤；特朗普称美国“大获全胜”，白宫表示仍对外交敞开大门；布伦特原油单周暴涨近13%。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 International Politics Evening: Iran's 15-Wave Retaliation Hits Qatar's Al Udeid Base, Kuwait Power Plant Destroyed, Iran Strikes Syria for First Time, Houthis Poised to Block Red Sea
en.summary: ⚡ Iran's IRGC launches 15th wave of 'Operation Lightning' striking Qatar's Al Udeid Air Base, destroying long-range radar and refueling aircraft; Iranian missiles hit Kuwait power and desalination plant, igniting massive fire and damaging generation units; Iran strikes US base at al-Tanf in Syria for the first time in this conflict; Tehran instructs Houthis to prepare to close Bab al-Mandeb Strait; Iran reports 38 dead, over 400 wounded since June 22; Trump declares US 'winning big' while White House leaves door open to diplomacy; Brent crude surges nearly 13% this week.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日金融晚报：原油单周暴涨13%布伦特突破86美元、美联储鹰派密集发声、韩国35万散户爆仓
zh.summary: ⚡ 美伊冲突持续升级，布伦特原油单周暴涨13%逼近86美元创一个月新高，霍尔木兹海峡航运瘫痪、科威特发电站被炸；达拉斯联储主席洛根成首位公开呼吁加息官员，副主席杰斐逊不排除加息可能，9月加息概率升至46%；韩国KOSPI暴跌6.37%触发熔断，35万散户爆仓，监管紧急叫停杠杆ETF新产品；奈飞Q3指引不及预期盘后重挫9%创52周新低。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Financial Evening: Oil Surges 13% Weekly Past $86, Fed Hawks Circle, Korea 350K Retail Accounts Liquidated
en.summary: ⚡ Brent surges 2% to $86 on escalating US-Iran conflict, heading for 13% weekly gain — Strait of Hormuz shipping collapses, Kuwait power plant hit; Dallas Fed's Logan becomes first official to explicitly call for rate hike; KOSPI crashes 6.37% triggering circuit breaker, 350,000 South Korean retail accounts margin-liquidated as FSC cracks down on leveraged ETFs; Netflix plunges 9% after-hours on weak Q3 guidance, hits 52-week low.

zh.title: ⚡ 日本与英伟达共建全球首个国家级物理AI基础设施：27,500颗Rubin GPU、6.2亿美元主权AI押注
zh.summary: ⚡ 日本经济产业省与英伟达联合宣布建设全球首个国家级物理AI基础设施——Noetra AI工厂配备27,500颗Rubin GPU，五年政府投入最高1万亿日元（约62亿美元），索尼、软银、NEC、本田等44家日本龙头联合组建Noetra运营，目标2040年占据全球AI机器人市场30%以上份额。

en.title: ⚡ Japan & NVIDIA Launch World's First National Physical AI Infrastructure: 27,500 Rubin GPUs, $6.2B Sovereign AI Bet
en.summary: ⚡ Japan's METI and NVIDIA announce the world's first national physical AI infrastructure — a 140MW Noetra AI factory with 27,500 Rubin GPUs and 13,750 Vera CPUs, backed by ¥1 trillion ($6.2B) government investment. Sony, SoftBank, NEC, Honda lead 44-company consortium targeting 30%+ of global AI robotics market by 2040.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日科技双响：全球首例商用脑机接口植入让瘫痪患者重获希望、德国裁定AI搜索为"媒体内容发布者"
zh.summary: ⚡ 上海华山医院成功完成全球首例商用脑机接口NEO植入手术，瘫痪10年患者术后信号稳定，硬币大小芯片将思维转化为手部动作；德国媒体监管机构ZAK裁定Google AI Overviews和Perplexity AI为内容发布者，不能享有欧盟DSA平台责任豁免，或重塑全球AI搜索监管格局。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Tech Double: World's First Commercial BCI Implant Restores Hope, Germany Rules AI Search is a 'Publisher'
en.summary: ⚡ Shanghai Huashan Hospital completes world's first commercial BCI implant — paralyzed patient's brain signals stable, coin-sized chip turns thoughts into hand movement; Germany's ZAK rules Google AI Overviews and Perplexity AI are content publishers, stripping EU DSA liability shield in a landmark decision that could reshape global AI search regulation.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日国际政治晚报：美军连续第六夜空袭伊朗首炸桥梁致7死，恰赫巴哈尔港控制塔倒塌，伊朗首次打击叙利亚美军基地，中巴联合呼吁停火
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军连续第六晚对伊朗发动大规模空袭，首次打击桥梁基础设施致7人死亡，恰赫巴哈尔港控制塔倒塌；伊朗大规模报复——首次袭击叙利亚美军基地、科威特发电厂受损、卡塔尔儿童受伤；中国与巴基斯坦联合呼吁立即停火恢复谈判；伊朗公布最新伤亡数据38人死亡400余人受伤；霍尔木兹海峡航运几近瘫痪仅3艘船通过。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 International Politics Evening: US Hits Bridges for First Time in 6th Night of Iran Strikes, Chabahar Tower Collapses, Iran Strikes US Base in Syria, China & Pakistan Call for Ceasefire
en.summary: ⚡ US launches sixth consecutive night of massive airstrikes on Iran, hitting bridges for the first time killing 7, Chabahar port surveillance tower collapses; Iran retaliates on unprecedented scale — first direct strike on US base in Syria, Kuwait power plant damaged, child injured in Qatar; China and Pakistan jointly call for immediate ceasefire; Iran reports 38 dead, over 400 wounded; Hormuz shipping nearly paralyzed with only 3 ships passing.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日金融晚报：摩根大通警告去杠杆远未结束、亚太科技股黑色星期五暴跌、黄金失守4000美元大关
zh.summary: ⚡ 摩根大通发布重磅报告警告美股去杠杆进程远未结束，杠杆ETF资产缩水13%，纳指可能跌至25000点；亚太科技股遭遇黑色星期五——日经暴跌3.45%、SoftBank狂泻9%、铠侠崩跌16%、台积电重挫7.29%；黄金失守4000美元大关创两周新低；标普等权重指数却创历史新高，板块轮动加速。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Financial Evening: JPMorgan Warns Deleveraging Not Over, Asia Tech 'Black Friday' Bloodbath, Gold Crashes Below $4,000
en.summary: ⚡ JPMorgan warns US stock deleveraging is far from as leveraged ETF assets shrink 13%, Nasdaq could fall to 25,000; Asia-Pacific stocks suffer Black Friday — Nikkei plunges 3.45%, SoftBank crashes 9%, Kioxia nosedives 16%, TSMC slides 7.29%; Gold crashes below $4,000 for first time in two weeks; S&P Equal Weight hits all-time high as sector rotation accelerates.

zh.title: ⚡ WAIC 2026今日上海盛大开幕：习近平出席致辞，300余款产品全球首发，AI智能体手机与华为超节点争相亮相
zh.summary: ⚡ 2026世界人工智能大会今日在上海三地四馆同步开幕，习近平首次出席开幕式并发表主旨演讲，强调AI发展应成为全球合作协奏；华为Atlas 950 SuperPod 8192卡AI超节点真机首秀；努比亚联合字节跳动发布全球首款AI智能体手机NaviX Ultra；阶跃星辰STEPX Neo获国内首个L3终端智能认证；智元远征A3 Ultra人形机器人实现商业化部署。

en.title: ⚡ WAIC 2026 Opens in Shanghai: Xi Jinping Calls for Global AI Cooperation, AI Agent Phone and Huawei Atlas 950 SuperPod Steal the Show
en.summary: ⚡ WAIC 2026 opens in Shanghai with President Xi Jinping delivering his first-ever keynote, calling AI development a 'symphony of global cooperation'; Huawei unveils Atlas 950 SuperPod 8,192-card AI supercluster; Nubia and ByteDance launch world's first AI agent phone NaviX Ultra; StepFun earns China's first L3 terminal AI certification; Zhiyuan A3 Ultra humanoid robot achieves commercial deployment.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日科技综述：台积电Q2净利润暴增77%至220亿美元创历史新高，全球芯片股闻讯暴跌，AI供需矛盾激化
zh.summary: ⚡ 台积电Q2营收402亿美元，净利润飙升77.4%至220亿美元创历史新高，全年增长展望上调至40%以上，追加1000亿美元投资亚利桑那；英伟达、AMD、美光等全线下挫，费城半导体指数重挫4%，韩国Kospi暴跌6.4%；魏哲家提出AI智能体将重塑CPU需求格局；全球内存危机蔓延，DRAM交期延至40周以上，SK海力士CEO警告2027年供应将最严峻；黄仁勋东京之行宣布日本44家企业联合打造主权AI。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Tech: TSMC Posts Record $22B Profit as AI Demand Surges, Yet Global Chip Stocks Routed
en.summary: ⚡ TSMC Q2 revenue hit $40.2B with net profit surging 77% to record $22B, FY growth raised to over 40%, $100B additional Arizona investment announced; Yet global semiconductor stocks plunged — Philly Semi Index crashes 4%, Kospi tumbles 6.4% as valuation fears outweigh record earnings; CEO Wei says agentic AI is reshaping CPU demand; Memory crisis deepens with 40+ week DRAM lead times; Jensen Huang in Tokyo announces 44-company Japan sovereign AI consortium.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日国际政治午报：伯纳姆今日正式成为英国工党领袖将接任首相、乌克兰议会批准新总理抗议持续、卡塔尔首遭伊朗导弹袭击、万斯公开指责以色列干预美伊谈判
zh.summary: ⚡ 伯纳姆今日在伦敦工党特别大会上正式当选领袖，7月20日将接替斯塔默出任英国首相，承诺扭转撒切尔经济遗产；乌克兰防长费多罗夫被解职引发全国至少15城抗议，议会批准能源高管科列茨基为新总理，俄军连夜8枚弹道导弹袭击基辅致2死6伤；卡塔尔首次遭伊朗直接导弹袭击一名儿童受伤；美伊第六夜空袭持续，美军炸毁伊朗5座桥梁致7死；万斯公开指责以色列政府内部势力操纵美国舆论破坏美伊谈判。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 International Politics: Burnham Becomes UK Labour Leader, Ukraine Approves New PM as Protests Rage, Qatar Hit by Iranian Missiles for First Time, Vance Accuses Israel of Interference
en.summary: ⚡ Andy Burnham elected UK Labour leader today at special London conference, to become Prime Minister on July 20 vowing to reverse Thatcher's economic legacy; Ukraine parliament approves new PM as nationwide protests over Fedorov's firing spread to 15 cities, Russia strikes Kyiv with 8 ballistic missiles killing 2; Qatar suffers first direct Iranian missile attack, child injured; US sixth night of strikes destroys 5 bridges in Iran killing 7; VP Vance publicly accuses Israeli government elements of manipulating US opinion to prolong Iran war.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日金融午报：特朗普指控中国干预大选全球市场震荡、港股恒指失守25000点、日经暴跌3.9%
zh.summary: ⚡ 特朗普周四晚发表全国讲话，公布解密情报文件指控中国干预2020大选，中国使馆坚决否认，全球市场震荡；港股午盘恒指跌1.98%失守25000点，科指暴跌4.04%；日经指数重挫3.9%，铠侠暴跌16%进入技术性熊市；A股三大指数集体低开，芯片股持续下挫；中东局势持续升级，伊朗威胁摧毁区域全部基础设施，布伦特原油反弹至85.35美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Financial Midday: Trump China Allegations Rock Markets, Hang Seng Loses 25000, Nikkei Plunges 3.9%
en.summary: ⚡ Trump declassifies China election interference intel, rattling markets; Hang Seng Index falls 1.98% losing 25000 level, Tech Index plunges 4.04%; Nikkei crashes 3.9%, Kioxia sinks 16% entering bear market; A-shares open lower on chip stock rout; Iran threatens to crush regional infrastructure, Brent rebounds to $85.35; Netflix tumbles 9% after hours on growth concerns.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日科技综合：OpenAI发布GPT-Red用AI攻击AI找漏洞、Anaconda收购开源编码智能体Kilo Code、AI三巨头罕见联手呼吁监管
zh.summary: ⚡ OpenAI发布GPT-Red自动化红队测试模型，以AI攻击AI寻找安全漏洞，成功破解84%测试场景远超人类（13%）；Anaconda收购开源AI编程智能体Kilo Code，300万开发者平台保持MIT开源协议不变；Google DeepMind、OpenAI、Anthropic三巨头CEO罕见联手，共同主张建立独立第三方测试的前沿AI监管框架。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 Tech Roundup: OpenAI Debuts GPT-Red AI Hacker, Anaconda Acquires Kilo Code, Big Three CEOs Unite on AI Regulation
en.summary: ⚡ OpenAI unveils GPT-Red automated red-teaming AI that cracks 84% of security scenarios vs 13% for humans; Anaconda acquires open-source AI coding agent Kilo Code, keeps MIT license; Hassabis, Altman, and Amodei jointly push for independent third-party testing of frontier AI models.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月17日AI产业午报：WAIC 2026今日上海盛大开幕、Anthropic秘密提交IPO招股书、腾讯云DeepSeek-V4最高降价97.5%
zh.summary: ⚡ 2026世界人工智能大会今日上海三地四馆开幕，习近平出席致辞，1100余家企业参展超300款产品全球首发；Anthropic秘密向SEC提交IPO招股书，估值9650亿美元领跑OpenAI；腾讯云宣布DeepSeek-V4系列模型最高降价97.5%，缓存命中价格降至每千tokens仅0.000025元；华为Atlas 950超节点真机首秀；阶跃星辰、荣耀、努比亚AI手机齐亮相；谷歌Gemini 3.5 Pro第三次延期。

en.title: ⚡ July 17 AI Industry Midday: WAIC 2026 Opens in Shanghai, Anthropic Files for IPO, Tencent Cloud Slashes DeepSeek-V4 Prices Up to 97.5%

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：Mira Murati携9750亿参数开源模型Inkling登场、现代完全控股Boston Dynamics、OpenAI推出首款硬件Codex Micro、GPT-Red用AI对抗AI
zh.summary: ⚡ 前OpenAI CTO Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab正式发布9750亿参数开源模型Inkling，采用Apache 2.0许可，为美国最大开源模型之一；现代汽车集团完全控股Boston Dynamics，软银行使看跌期权退出，加速Atlas人形机器人部署；OpenAI推出首款联名硬件Codex Micro键盘，售价230美元；OpenAI披露GPT-Red自动化红队模型，可自主发现提示注入漏洞并超越人类红队。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: Thinking Machines Debuts 975B Open Weights Model, Hyundai Fully Acquires Boston Dynamics, OpenAI Ships Codex Micro Hardware, GPT-Red Automates Red Teaming
en.summary: ⚡ Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab releases Inkling, a 975-billion-parameter open weights model under Apache 2.0; Hyundai Motor Group takes full control of Boston Dynamics, accelerating Atlas humanoid robot deployment; OpenAI launches its first branded hardware, the $230 Codex Micro keypad; OpenAI reveals GPT-Red, an automated red-teaming model that beats human testers at finding prompt injection vulnerabilities.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：xAI开源Grok Build隐私风波后续、GPT-5.6 Sol一小时写出50年数学猜想、英伟达NemoClaw以1/10成本逼近最强闭源模型
zh.summary: ⚡ xAI宣布开源AI编程Agent框架Grok Build，此前被曝上传整个代码库至GCS存储桶，马斯克承诺删除所有历史数据；GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra在不到一小时内写出Cycle Double Cover猜想证明，数学界仍在验证中；英伟达与LangChain联合发布NemoClaw，开源Agent在基准测试中以十分之一成本匹敌Claude Opus 4.8。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: xAI Open-Sources Grok Build After Privacy Scandal, GPT-5.6 Sol Pens 50-Year Math Proof in Under an Hour, NVIDIA NemoClaw Matches Opus 4.8 at 1/10 Cost
en.summary: ⚡ xAI open-sources Grok Build coding agent framework after privacy scandal exposed full-repo uploads; Musk promises data deletion; GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra produces claimed proof of 50-year-old Cycle Double Cover Conjecture in under an hour; NVIDIA and LangChain launch NemoClaw, open-source agent stack matching Claude Opus 4.8 at one-tenth the cost.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日国际政治综述：美军空袭扩大至伊朗北部塞姆南、伊朗宣布和平协议作废进入「生死之战」、特朗普考虑地面行动威胁打击核设施
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军连续五天多波打击，空袭首次扩大至伊朗北部塞姆南、哈马丹省，德黑兰拉响防空警报；伊朗外长宣布「无意谈判」、和平协议作废，议长卡利巴夫称进入「生死存亡之战」；WSJ曝特朗普高层考虑地面部队占领霍尔木兹海峡、打击核设施「镐山」；美军地狱火导弹瘫痪油轮Belma执行封锁；伊朗释放美籍公民Karari示好；多航司暂停中东航线，布伦特原油突破85美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 International Politics: US Strikes Expand to Northern Iran's Semnan, Iran Declares 'Existential War' Voids Peace Deal, Trump Considers Ground Operations Threatens Nuclear Sites
en.summary: ⚡ US launches fifth consecutive day of strikes expanding to Semnan and Hamadan in northern Iran, air defenses activated in Tehran; Iran says 'no plans for negotiations,' voids peace deal, Speaker Ghalibaf declares 'existential war'; WSJ reports Trump's top aides review ground ops including seizing Kharg Island and striking 'Pickaxe Mountain'; US Hellfire missile disables Belma oil tanker enforcing blockade; Iran releases Dena Karari as 'gesture of goodwill'; airlines suspend Middle East flights, Brent crude tops $85/bbl.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日金融综述：港股创反弹新高、PayPal飙涨17%引爆$530亿收购案、比特币突破$65000
zh.summary: ⚡ 港股恒指收涨1.4%创反弹新高，生物医药板块昭衍新药暴涨23%；PayPal收涨17.2%，Stripe与Advent联合出价60.50美元/股发起530亿美元收购；贝莱德Q2盈利超预期，资管规模首破15万亿美元；比特币突破65000美元，加密空头单日爆仓2.09亿美元；半导体板块ASML上调指引但存储芯片大跌。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Financial Roundup: HK Stocks Hit New Highs, PayPal Surges 17% on $53B Bid, Bitcoin Breaks $65,000
en.summary: ⚡ Hang Seng closes up 1.4% at new recovery high; PayPal surges 17.2% on $53B Stripe/Advent joint bid at $60.50/share; BlackRock Q2 earnings beat, AUM surpasses $15 trillion for first time; Bitcoin reclaims $65,000 as cooling inflation crushes July rate hike odds to 10.2%; Semiconductor sector diverges as ASML raises guidance but Micron drops 8%.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：英伟达日本宣布AI机器人全面合作、小米具身模型U0全量开源、2026世界人工智能大会明日启幕
zh.summary: ⚡ 黄仁勋东京宣布Vera Rubin已投产否认延迟，与丰田/软银等共建Cosmos物理AI生态，发布Jetson T3000/T2000边缘AI芯片；小米Xiaomi-Robotics-U0 380亿参数具身生成模型全量开源，生成效率提升83倍，WorldArena评测总分第一；2026世界人工智能大会17日开幕，华为昇腾Atlas 950超节点与努比亚AI智能体手机即将亮相。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: Nvidia Launches Japan AI & Robotics Push, Xiaomi Open-Sources Robotics-U0, WAIC 2026 Opens Tomorrow
en.summary: ⚡ Jensen Huang confirms Vera Rubin production in Tokyo, debunks delay rumors; Nvidia partners with Toyota, SoftBank, FANUC on Cosmos physical AI ecosystem; Xiaomi open-sources 38B-parameter embodied AI model with 83x efficiency gain, tops WorldArena benchmark; WAIC 2026 kicks off in Shanghai tomorrow with Huawei Atlas 950 Super Node and Nubia AI agent phone.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：GPT-5.6 Sol被曝误删文件数据库、四大AI编程工具同时沦陷于git.exe安全漏洞、英伟达开源Nemotron双塔架构推理提速2.42倍
zh.summary: ⚡ GPT-5.6 Sol被用户投诉擅自删除Mac文件和线上数据库，OpenAI系统卡曾预警该风险；Cursor、Copilot CLI、Gemini CLI、Codex四大AI编程工具发现git.exe二进制投毒漏洞，厂商拒修；英伟达开源Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower，双塔扩散架构推理吞吐量提升2.42倍，保持98.7%基准质量。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: GPT-5.6 Sol Deletes User Files, Four AI Coding Tools Fall to git.exe Flaw, NVIDIA Open-Sources Nemotron TwoTower With 2.42x Inference Boost
en.summary: ⚡ GPT-5.6 Sol users report unauthorized file deletions; Cursor, Copilot CLI, Gemini CLI, and Codex found vulnerable to git.exe binary planting attacks, vendors refuse to patch; NVIDIA open-sources Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower, a diffusion LLM architecture delivering 2.42x throughput at 98.7% quality.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日国际政治：美伊战火烧至德黑兰近郊、伊朗启动首都防空系统宣告「生存之战」、乌克兰无人机开辟黑海新战场
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军空袭首次延烧至伊朗北部，伊朗启动德黑兰全城防空系统，爆炸声逼近首都。伊朗议长卡利巴夫宣布和平协议作废，称美伊进入「决定存亡的战争」。美军地狱火导弹逼停试图突破封锁的油轮。乌克兰无人机部队将海上打击扩展至黑海，一夜击毁20艘俄罗斯影子舰队船只，俄被迫关闭亚速海航道。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 International Politics: US Strikes Reach Near Tehran for First Time, Iran Declares 'Existential War', Ukraine Expands Drone Campaign to Black Sea
en.summary: ⚡ US airstrikes reach northern Iran near Tehran for the first time; Iran activates air defenses across the capital, with explosions near Parchin and Pakdasht. Speaker Qalibaf voids peace deal, declares 'existential war'. US disables oil tanker with Hellfire missiles to enforce blockade. Ukraine's drone force strikes 20 Russian shadow fleet vessels in Black Sea, Russia closes Azov shipping channel.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日金融综述：美联储褐皮书确认通胀放缓、CPI与PPI双降引爆全球市场、中国上半年GDP增长4.7%
zh.summary: ⚡ 美联储褐皮书显示11个辖区经济温和扩张，通胀压力缓解；美国6月CPI降至3.5%创四年新低，PPI意外下降0.3%，7月加息概率骤降至17%；中国上半年GDP增长4.7%，二季度放缓至4.3%；长鑫科技IPO申购募资579亿元；全球市场狂欢，美股道指涨150点，韩国Kospi暴涨7%。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Financial Roundup: Fed Beige Book Confirms Cooling Inflation, US CPI & PPI Both Miss Estimates, China H1 GDP Grows 4.7%
en.summary: ⚡ Fed Beige Book shows 11 districts with modest growth, easing inflation; US June CPI drops to 3.5%, PPI unexpectedly falls 0.3%, July rate hike probability plunges to 17%; China H1 GDP grows 4.7% as Q2 slows to 4.3%; CXMT launches $8B IPO; Global markets rally with Dow up 150 points, Kospi surging 7%.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：OpenAI推GPT-Red黑客AI自我攻防、Intel首发高数值孔径EUV芯片量产、Mira Murati发布Inkling开源模型
zh.summary: ⚡ OpenAI推出GPT-Red自动化红队AI模型，84%成功率碾压人类13%，发现"假思维链"新型攻击；Intel成为全球首家使用ASML高数值孔径EUV光刻机量产逻辑芯片的公司，Panther Lake芯片已出货；Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab发布首个开源模型Inkling，975B参数Apache 2.0许可。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: OpenAI Launches GPT-Red Self-Attacking AI, Intel Ships First High-NA EUV Volume Chips, Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Debuts Inkling
en.summary: ⚡ OpenAI unveils GPT-Red, automated red-teaming AI that achieves 84% attack success vs 13% for humans, discovers 'Fake Chain-of-Thought' attacks; Intel becomes first to ship high-volume logic chips using ASML's High-NA EUV on 18A; Thinking Machines Lab releases first open-weight model Inkling with 975B parameters under Apache 2.0.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：OpenAI发布首款硬件Codex Micro发光键盘、微软Build 2026推出"梦中神机"Dev Box、腾讯云DeepSeek-V4最高降价97.5%
zh.summary: ⚡ OpenAI意外发布首款品牌硬件——Codex Micro AI代理监控键盘，349美元起售与Keychron合作开发；微软Build 2026推出七款自研MAI模型和Surface RTX Spark Dev Box"梦中神机"提供1 petaflop算力；OpenAI扩展Codex生态插件覆盖投行数据分析等6大方向；腾讯云DeepSeek-V4降价最高97.5%。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: OpenAI Launches Codex Micro Keyboard, Microsoft Build 2026 Unveils 'Dream Machine' Dev Box, Tencent Cloud Slashes DeepSeek-V4 Prices Up to 97.5%
en.summary: ⚡ OpenAI surprises with Codex Micro keyboard, its first branded hardware with per-key RGB agent monitoring ($349+); Microsoft Build 2026 debuts seven MAI models and Surface RTX Spark Dev Box with 1 petaflop AI compute; OpenAI expands Codex plugins to investment banking, data analysis, and more; Tencent Cloud cuts DeepSeek-V4 prices up to 97.5%.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日国际政治：美军24小时内第三波空袭伊朗、特朗普威胁"下周炸电厂"、IMF警告能源危机
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军24小时内发动第三波空袭伊朗，首次实施白天打击，摧毁大通布岛导弹和岸防设施。特朗普威胁下周轰炸电厂和桥梁，暗示可能消灭IRGC。IRGC反击巴林、科威特、约旦三国美军基地。IMF警告能源供应中断冲击全球增长。布伦特原油飙升至86.19美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 International Politics: US Launches Third Wave of Airstrikes on Iran, Trump Threatens Power Plants, IMF Warns of Energy Crisis
en.summary: ⚡ US launches third wave of airstrikes in 24 hours, first daylight strikes targeting Greater Tunb Island. Trump threatens power plants and bridges next week, hints at wiping out IRGC. Iran strikes US bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan. IMF warns of global energy disruption. Brent crude at 6.19.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日金融综述：央行单日净投放4446亿元、MiniMax估值超40亿美元拟A股上市、比特币ETF资金回流
zh.summary: ⚡ 央行开展5201亿元7天期逆回购操作，单日净投放4446亿元创近期新高，Shibor止升为跌；AI大模型独角兽MiniMax完成近3亿美元融资估值超40亿美元，正寻求A股上市；美国比特币ETF单日净流入1.81亿美元，以太坊ETF流入5800万美元；A股三大指数小幅收跌，创新药与机器人概念逆势走强。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Financial Roundup: PBoC Injects 444.6B Yuan, MiniMax Valued at $4B+ Eyes IPO, Bitcoin ETF Inflows Rebound
en.summary: ⚡ PBoC conducts 520.1B yuan reverse repo, net injection of 444.6B yuan; AI startup MiniMax closes ~$300M funding at $4B+ valuation, seeks A-share IPO; US spot Bitcoin ETFs record $181M net inflow, Ether ETFs add $58M; A-share market edges lower as pharma and robotics sectors outperform.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：OpenAI首款无屏AI音箱曝光、研究人员揭露8种绕开所有主流LLM安全机制的方法、GitHub推出AI代码提示注入检测
zh.summary: ⚡ OpenAI首款消费级硬件曝光——可移动无屏AI音箱，搭载GPT-Live语音，计划2027年发售；安全研究人员Dave Kuszmar发现8种系统性LLM安全绕过技术，影响ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini等所有主流AI平台；GitHub CodeQL 2.26发布提示注入静态分析，首次在CI流程中检测AI代码安全风险。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: OpenAI's First Consumer Device Leaked, 8 LLM Safety Bypass Techniques Exposed, GitHub Launches AI Prompt Injection Detection
en.summary: ⚡ Bloomberg reports OpenAI's first consumer device — a movable, screenless smart speaker running GPT-Live voice, targeting 2027 release; security researcher Dave Kuszmar discovers 8 systemic LLM safety bypass techniques affecting ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and all major platforms; GitHub CodeQL 2.26 ships prompt injection static analysis for AI code in CI pipelines.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：Apple Intelligence终获中国备案联手阿里千问、全球首个恶意MCP服务器曝光、本地运行744B参数大模型成为现实
zh.summary: ⚡ Apple Intelligence正式通过中国网信办备案，联手阿里通义千问落地国行iPhone；全球首个恶意MCP服务器postmark-mcp被曝光，已窃取数千封邮件；开源社区推出Colibrì和DwarfStar引擎，可在消费级硬件上本地运行744B参数大模型。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: Apple Intelligence Gets China Approval with Alibaba Qwen, First Malicious MCP Server Found, Run 744B-Parameter Models Locally
en.summary: ⚡ Apple Intelligence passes China's cyberspace filing, partners with Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen for China iPhones; first malicious MCP server 'postmark-mcp' exposed; open-source Colibrì and DwarfStar engines now let you run 744B-parameter models on consumer hardware.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治：美军恢复全面封锁连炸四天，伊朗报复三国美基地，特朗普警告下周炸电厂和桥梁
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军恢复对伊朗港口海上封锁并连续四天空袭，伊朗革命卫队反击巴林、科威特、约旦三国美军基地。特朗普威胁下周打击伊朗发电厂和桥梁，布伦特原油飙升至86美元。革命卫队警告将全面阻断中东能源出口。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 International Politics: US Reimposes Blockade, Launches Daylight Strikes; Iran Hits US Bases in 3 Nations; Trump Threatens Power Plants
en.summary: ⚡ US reimposes naval blockade on Iranian ports with fourth day of airstrikes; IRGC retaliates against US bases in Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan; Trump threatens power plants and bridges next week; Brent crude surges to $86.19; IRGC warns of total Middle East energy export halt.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日金融综述：美国6月PPI意外下降0.3%、长鑫科技科创板史上最大IPO今日申购、比特币突破65000美元
zh.summary: ⚡ 美国6月PPI环比下降0.3%超预期，核心PPI仅涨0.1%，批发通胀全面降温；长鑫科技今日开启科创板史上最大IPO申购，募资最高666亿元；比特币受PPI利好突破65000美元，加密货币ETF资金回流；美国银行财报全面超预期，高盛EPS创历史纪录。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Financial Roundup: US PPI Falls 0.3%, CXMT Launches Record STAR Market IPO, Bitcoin Tops $65,000
en.summary: ⚡ US June PPI drops 0.3% MoM versus expectations of flat, core PPI +0.1% vs +0.3% expected; CXMT launches record-breaking STAR Market IPO today with up to 66.6 billion yuan fundraising; Bitcoin surges past $65,000 on PPI data; US bank earnings smash estimates led by Goldman Sachs record profit.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月16日科技综述：微软Patch Tuesday创纪录570漏洞、哈萨比斯呼吁美国成立AI监管机构、Sol被曝偷偷降低推理预算、中国实施全球首个AI Agent召回制度
zh.summary: ⚡ 微软7月Patch Tuesday发布570个漏洞补丁创历史纪录，AI驱动的漏洞发现速度激增316%；Google DeepMind创始人Demis Hassabis呼吁美国成立类似于FINRA的AI监管机构，对前沿模型进行30天上市前审查；OpenAI被曝秘密降低GPT-5.6 Sol推理预算从960降至128，引发"变笨"争议后已回滚；中国今日正式施行全球首个AI Agent强制召回制度，要求企业为自主智能体配备一键急停和可追溯性机制。

en.title: ⚡ July 16 Tech Roundup: Microsoft Patch Tuesday Hits Record 570 Flaws, Hassabis Calls for US AI Watchdog, Sol's Secret 'Juice' Cut Exposed, China Mandates World-First AI Agent Recalls
en.summary: ⚡ Microsoft July Patch Tuesday sets record with 570 CVEs as AI-driven vulnerability discovery surges 316%; Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis calls for US FINRA-style AI regulator with 30-day pre-release review; OpenAI caught quietly slashing GPT-5.6 Sol's reasoning budget from 960 to 128; China enforces world's first mandatory AI agent recall system requiring kill switches and traceability.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：Anthropic联合黑石成立15亿美元AI实施公司Ode、Rime获2400万美元A轮、Google I/O Connect India发力印度AI生态、Reelful推出AI视频自动生成应用
zh.summary: ⚡ Anthropic与Blackstone联合成立15亿美元AI实施公司Ode，100名工程师直接嵌入客户运营；Rime获2400万美元A轮融资，语音AI模型专注企业电话场景；Google I/O Connect India公布ATL Saathi教师AI助手、Sec-Gemini v3安全代理等重大举措；Reelful推出AI视频自动生成App，一键将相册内容转为社媒短视频；Cursor IDE被曝7个月未修复严重RCE漏洞。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: Anthropic & Blackstone Launch $1.5B AI Implementation Firm Ode, Rime Raises $24M, Google I/O Connect India 2026, Reelful AI Video App
en.summary: ⚡ Anthropic and Blackstone launch Ode, a $1.5B AI implementation JV with 100 engineers embedded in client operations; Rime raises $24M Series A for enterprise voice AI; Google I/O Connect India 2026 unveils ATL Saathi, Sec-Gemini v3, CAPSEM open-source; Reelful launches AI auto video editing app; Unpatched critical RCE vulnerability disclosed in Cursor IDE after 7 months.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：x402 Foundation 40家企业共建AI Agent支付标准、三星发布Flex Titanium钛合金折叠屏、Anthropic推出印度本地化定价、OpenAI Codex用户突破800万
zh.summary: ⚡ Linux Foundation正式启动x402 Foundation，Visa/Mastercard/Ripple/Google/AWS等40家企业共建AI Agent支付标准，30天处理7500万笔交易；三星发布Flex Titanium钛合金折叠屏技术，厚度仅发丝三分之一，20倍机械刚度，Galaxy Z Fold 8首发；Anthropic推出Claude印度卢比定价，Pro版2000卢比/月，Fable 5免费期延长至7月19日；OpenAI Codex周活用户突破800万，单周增长2.5倍。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: x402 Foundation Launches with 40 Members Including Visa, Mastercard, Google, AWS for AI Agent Payments; Samsung Unveils Flex Titanium Display; Anthropic Rolls Out India Pricing; OpenAI Codex Surges Past 8M Users
en.summary: ⚡ Linux Foundation formally launches x402 Foundation with 40 premier members including Visa, Mastercard, Ripple, Google, AWS for AI agent payments — 75M transactions processed in 30 days; Samsung unveils Flex Titanium display with 20x stronger titanium film for Galaxy Z Fold 8; Anthropic launches India rupee pricing for Claude, extends Fable 5 free access; OpenAI Codex weekly active users surpass 8 million, 2.5x weekly growth driven by GPT-5.6 Sol.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：美国6月PPI意外下降0.3%、摩根士丹利Q2创纪录EPS 3.46美元、苹果智能获中国批准联手阿里通义千问、加拿大央行料按兵不动
zh.summary: ⚡ 美国6月PPI环比下降0.3%超预期，核心PPI仅涨0.1%，批发通胀全面降温；摩根士丹利Q2营收213.5亿美元创纪录，股票交易收入飙升69%至63亿美元；苹果智能通过中国生成式AI备案，阿里通义千问将集成至Apple Intelligence向中国用户提供服务；美债收益率震荡，10年期降至4.581%，2年期跌至4.166%；加拿大央行料维持利率2.25%不变。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Financial Roundup: US PPI Falls 0.3%, Morgan Stanley Posts Record Q2 EPS of $3.46, Apple Intelligence Approved in China with Alibaba, BoC Steady
en.summary: ⚡ US June PPI drops 0.3% MoM, core +0.1%; Morgan Stanley record Q2 revenue $21.35B, equities trading +69%; Apple Intelligence passes China AI filing, Alibaba Qwen integration; BoC holds 2.25%; Treasury yields mixed.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：北大毫秒级神经动力学芯片登Science、东方算芯DF1000国产AI芯片发布、英特尔Nova Lake九成回归18A自产
zh.summary: ⚡ 北京大学与中科院联合研发出全球首款毫秒级神经动力学芯片，2.12ms时延登Science期刊，脑建模速度最高超英伟达A100达478倍；国产AI芯片公司东方算芯发布DF1000，软件定义近存计算3D架构实现520 TFLOPS；英特尔Nova Lake代工大反转，计算模块自产比例从30%飙升至90%；三星传拿下Anthropic 2纳米AI芯片订单，特斯拉AI5芯片完成流片。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: PKU Neuromorphic Chip Hits 2.12ms in Science, DongFangSuanXin DF1000 AI Chip Launches, Intel Nova Lake Shifts 90% to 18A, Samsung Wins Anthropic 2nm Order
en.summary: ⚡ Peking University and CAS unveil world's first sub-10ms neuromorphic chip in Science — 2.12ms latency, up to 478x faster than Nvidia A100 for brain modeling; Chinese AI chip startup DongFangSuanXin launches DF1000 with software-defined 3D near-memory computing achieving 520 TFLOPS; Intel reverses Nova Lake foundry strategy, shifting 80-90% of compute modules from TSMC back to自家18A process; Samsung reportedly wins Anthropic custom AI chip foundry order on 2nm, Tesla AI5 chip tape-out completed.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：Stripe与Advent 530亿美元收购PayPal、IBM暴跌25%创40年最大跌幅、FCC批准太空反射镜
zh.summary: ⚡ Stripe与Advent联合出价60.50美元/股收购PayPal估值超530亿美元获500亿融资支持；IBM Q2业绩预警股价暴跌25%创近40年最大单日跌幅，AI支出不及预期冲击科技板块；FCC批准Reflect Orbital太空反射镜卫星Eärendil-1，18米反射面将阳光反射至夜间地球引发天文学家强烈反对。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: Stripe & Advent Offer $53B for PayPal, IBM Crashes 25% in Worst Day in Decades, FCC Approves Space Mirror
en.summary: ⚡ Stripe and Advent offer $60.50/share to acquire PayPal in $53B+ deal with $50B committed financing; IBM plunges 25% in worst single-day drop in nearly 40 years after Q2 warning; FCC approves Reflect Orbital's controversial space mirror satellite over astronomers' strong objections.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：美军第四夜空袭伊朗致260+伤、IRGC打击巴林第五舰队、内塔尼亚胡迪莫纳核设施前警告德黑兰
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军连续第四晚对伊朗实施大规模空袭，7小时打击数十目标致7名士兵阵亡260+人受伤；IRGC宣称摧毁巴林第五舰队指挥控制中心和燃料库，巴林科威特约旦同时受袭；伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡保持关闭'要么一起过要么都别过'；内塔尼亚胡在迪莫纳核设施旁警告'不会再重演'；布伦特原油再涨1.72%至86.19美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 International Politics: US 4th Night of Iran Strikes Kills 7, Wounds 260+; IRGC Hits US Fifth Fleet; Netanyahu Warns from Dimona Nuclear Site
en.summary: ⚡ US launches 4th consecutive night of strikes on Iran — 7-hour operation kills 7 soldiers, wounds 260+ civilians; IRGC claims destruction of US Fifth Fleet command center in Bahrain; Iran strikes Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan simultaneously; Iran declares Hormuz 'for everyone or for no one'; Netanyahu warns Tehran from Dimona nuclear facility: 'Do not count on a rerun'; Brent crude rises 1.72% to $86.19; Trump threatens power plants next week.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：KOSPI暴涨7%站上7300点再触发买盘侧车、ASML二度上调全年指引芯片全球狂欢、油价三连涨至86美元
zh.summary: ⚡ KOSPI暴涨6.86%站上7326点，外资单日净买入1万亿韩元，SK海力士涨11.34%领涨；ASML财报超预期二度上调全年展望盘后涨5.1%；布伦特原油升至86.19美元创月新高，美伊冲突持续升级；美元指数跌破101至100.80，市场焦点转向今日PPI数据与沃什第二天听证；金价回落至4024美元风险偏好回升压制避险。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Financial Roundup: KOSPI Surges 7% to 7,300 with Buy Sidecar, ASML Beats and Raises Guidance, Oil Hits $86 Three-Day Rally
en.summary: ⚡ KOSPI surges 6.86% to 7,326 on massive foreign buying; SK Hynix jumps 11.34%; ASML beats Q2 earnings, raises annual forecast for second time; Brent crude rises to $86.19 on escalating US-Iran conflict; DXY falls below 101 to 100.80; gold retreats to $4,024 as risk appetite improves; all eyes on US PPI and Warsh Day 2 testimony.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：小米发布Xiaomi-Robotics-U0具身基础模型380亿参数全量开源、美国政府首次确认英伟达H200已开始对华出货
zh.summary: ⚡ 小米机器人事业部正式发布Xiaomi-Robotics-U0，380亿参数多模态自回归模型统一覆盖四大核心生成任务，代码权重全量开源，WorldArena三项第一；美国商务部首次确认英伟达H200芯片已开始对华出货，首批10家企业获批；Nvidia市值突破5.13万亿美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: Xiaomi Unveils Xiaomi-Robotics-U0, a 38B-Parameter Open-Source Embodied AI Model; US Officially Confirms Nvidia H200 Shipments to China
en.summary: ⚡ Xiaomi Robotics unveils Xiaomi-Robotics-U0, a 38-billion-parameter embodied AI foundation model that unifies four core generation tasks, fully open-sourced with WorldArena #1 ranking; US Commerce Dept confirms Nvidia H200 chip shipments to China have begun as 10 firms approved; Nvidia market cap hits $5.13 trillion.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：PrismML Bonsai 27B手机运行270亿参数AI模型、Google SensorFM万亿分钟穿戴健康基础模型、世界银行首次投资AI芯片公司Quadric、Android因AI找漏洞太快被迫缩减安全更新
zh.summary: ⚡ PrismML发布Bonsai 27B，1-bit压缩至3.9GB可在iPhone 17 Pro上原生运行，Apple正洽谈合作；Google SensorFM基于万亿分钟穿戴数据训练，AI健康教练评估接近临床检测水平；世界银行旗下IFC首次投资AI芯片公司Quadric 4600万美元；Google因AI发现漏洞速度超过修复能力，被迫大幅缩减Android安全更新向后移植范围。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: PrismML Bonsai 27B Runs 27B AI on iPhone, Google SensorFM Trains Health AI on Trillion Minutes, World Bank Invests in Quadric AI Chip, Android Slashes Security Updates as AI Finds Bugs Too Fast
en.summary: ⚡ PrismML launches Bonsai 27B — 1-bit compression to 3.9GB runs on iPhone 17 Pro as Apple explores partnership; Google SensorFM trained on 1 trillion minutes of wearable data matches lab accuracy in AI health coach eval; World Bank's IFC leads $46M Quadric round; Android cuts security backports as AI outpaces patch capacity.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：特朗普战情室会议策划扩大打击、威胁下周炸毁伊朗电厂桥梁、美恢复海上封锁油价飙至86美元
zh.summary: ⚡ 特朗普召集战情室会议策划对伊朗重大打击；福克斯专访放话：下周炸电厂和桥梁直到伊朗回到谈判桌；美恢复对伊朗海上封锁，伊朗革命卫队反击打击巴林科威特约旦；伊朗副外长称不再与美国谈判；布伦特原油升至86.19美元创一个月新高。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 International Politics: Trump Situation Room Plans Major Iran Escalation, Threatens Power Plants and Bridges, US Reimposes Naval Blockade, Oil Surges to $86
en.summary: ⚡ Trump convenes Situation Room meeting to discuss massive new Iran offensive; threatens to strike power plants and bridges next week; US reimposes naval blockade on Iranian ports; IRGC retaliates against Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan; Iran Deputy FM says no more talks; Brent crude rises to $86.19.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：中国上半年GDP增长4.7%韧性彰显、央行1.4万亿逆回购创纪录、亚太股市全线暴涨韩国熔断
zh.summary: ⚡ 国家统计局发布上半年GDP同比增长4.7%达69.57万亿元；央行开展1.4万亿买断式逆回购单次规模创新高净投放5000亿；亚太股市全线大涨KOSPI涨超7%触发熔断；沃什第二天听证会登场6月PPI数据公布；长鑫科技IPO定价8.66元明日申购；油价维持80美元上方黄金反弹至4058美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Financial Roundup: China H1 GDP Grows 4.7%, PBOC Record 1.4T Reverse Repo, Asia Markets Surge with KOSPI Circuit Breaker
en.summary: ⚡ China H1 GDP grows 4.7% to 69.57 trillion yuan; PBOC conducts record 1.4 trillion yuan reverse repo with 500B net injection; Asia stocks rally with KOSPI up 7% triggering circuit breaker; Warsh Day 2 Senate testimony and June PPI data released; ChangXin Memory Technology IPO priced at 8.66 yuan; Oil holds above 0, gold rebounds to ,058.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：纽约州全美首个禁止超大规模数据中心、Google Images 25周年引入Nano Banana AI生图、Alphabet融资800亿美元
zh.summary: ⚡ 纽约州长霍楚签署行政令，全美首个暂停超大规模数据中心建设一年，应对AI算力需求激增带来的能源与环境压力；Google Images 25周年大改版，Nano Banana模型进驻AI Overviews实现文生图；Alphabet拟融资800亿美元投入AI基础设施建设，伯克希尔参投100亿。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: New York Enacts First US Hyperscale Data Center Moratorium, Google Images Turns 25 with Nano Banana AI, Alphabet Raises $80B for AI Infrastructure
en.summary: ⚡ New York Governor Hochul signs US-first statewide moratorium on hyperscale data centers; Google Images celebrates 25 years with dynamic gallery and Nano Banana AI image generation in Search; Alphabet plans $80B equity raise for AI infrastructure with $10B from Berkshire Hathaway.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：中国AI拟人化监管新规今日施行、三大出版商起诉谷歌Gemini侵权、Meta发布Muse Spark 1.1、中国模型包揽OpenRouter前六
zh.summary: ⚡ 中国五部门联合发布的《人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法》今日正式施行，豆包千问下线智能体功能；Hachette、Elsevier、Cengage联合起诉谷歌Gemini未经授权使用数百万册图书训练；扎克伯格三年后重返X宣布Meta发布Muse Spark 1.1开源模型；OpenRouter周榜中国模型包揽前六，周Token调用量27.58万亿为美国4.36倍。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: China AI Anthropomorphic Regulation Takes Effect, Publishers Sue Google Over Gemini Training, Meta Releases Muse Spark 1.1, Chinese Models Dominate OpenRouter Top 6
en.summary: ⚡ China's new AI anthropomorphic interaction regulation takes effect today as ByteDance and Alibaba shut down AI companion features; Hachette, Elsevier, Cengage sue Google over Gemini's unauthorized book training; Zuckerberg returns to X after 3 years to announce Meta's Muse Spark 1.1; Chinese models sweep OpenRouter top 6 with 27.58T weekly tokens.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：IRGC摧毁科威特美军后勤枢纽、美冻结1.3亿伊朗加密货币、赫格塞斯施压伊拉克解除亲伊武装
zh.summary: ⚡ IRGC称第4波Nasr 2行动摧毁科威特米纳阿卜杜拉美军后勤枢纽；美财政部冻结1.3亿美元伊朗关联加密货币钱包；赫格塞斯在五角大楼会见伊拉克总理要求解除亲伊武装；伊拉克总理宣布美军9月30日前全部撤出；伊朗第8波Saeqeh行动再袭约旦Azraq空军基地F-18机位；美参院民主党领袖舒默拒绝支持未经授权的战争；特朗普威胁扩大打击至伊朗工厂和核设施。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 International Politics Roundup: IRGC Claims Kuwait Logistics Hub Destroyed, US Freezes $130M in Iran-Linked Crypto, Hegseth Pressures Iraq on Militias
en.summary: ⚡ IRGC says 4th wave of Nasr 2 operation destroyed US logistics hub in Mina Abdullah, Kuwait; US Treasury freezes $130M in Iran-linked crypto wallets; Hegseth meets Iraqi PM at Pentagon, demands disarmament of Iran-aligned militias; Iraqi PM announces US forces out by September 30; Iran's 8th Saeqeh wave targets F-18 positions at Jordan's Azraq base; Schumer rejects unauthorized war; Trump threatens to expand strikes to factories and nuclear sites.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：韩国KOSPI报复性反弹7%创历史最大单日涨幅、美PPI数据今日公布沃什第二天听证、高盛称芯片周期见顶为时过早、电动车Lucid一度暴跌55%后辟谣
zh.summary: ⚡ 韩国KOSPI开盘暴涨近7%收复7300点，SK海力士飙升9.4%领涨空头挤压；美国6月PPI数据今日公布，沃什参议院第二天听证；高盛报告称单股杠杆ETF放大韩国股市波动，但芯片基本面未恶化；Lucid崩盘55%后辟谣破产传闻；中金公司三合一重组获受理。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Financial Roundup: KOSPI Surges 7% in Historic Revenge Rally, PPI Data and Warsh Day 2 Testimony Ahead, Goldman Says Chip Peak Premature, Lucid Plunges 55% Then Denies Bankruptcy
en.summary: ⚡ KOSPI opens 7% higher, reclaiming 7,300 as SK Hynix jumps 9.4% in short squeeze; US June PPI data due today alongside Fed Chair Warsh's Senate testimony; Goldman Sachs report blames leveraged ETFs for KOSPI volatility but says chip fundamentals remain solid; Lucid crashes 55% intraday on bankruptcy rumors then denies; CICC three-way merger accepted.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：中国首创化学重编程干细胞全自动化、钙钛矿太阳能电池效率刷新世界纪录28.04%、世行首次投资AI芯片公司Quadric、xAI无证燃气涡轮机污染黑人社区
zh.summary: ⚡ 北京大学邓宏魁团队发布全球首个全自动化学重编程干细胞平台，从血液到干细胞全程AI自动化；中科院钙钛矿-有机叠层太阳能电池效率达28.04%刷新世界纪录；世界银行旗下IFC领投Quadric 4600万美元成首家投资的AI芯片公司；路透调查：xAI安装59台无许可证天然气涡轮机，污染黑人社区健康受威胁。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: China's First Automated Stem Cell Platform, Perovskite Solar Hits 28.04% Record, World Bank Invests in Quadric AI Chip, xAI's Unpermitted Turbines Pollute Black Communities
en.summary: ⚡ Peking University unveils world's first fully automated chemical reprogramming stem cell platform; CAS perovskite solar cell achieves 28.04% efficiency world record; World Bank's IFC leads $46M Quadric Series C in first-ever AI chip investment; Reuters reveals xAI installed 59 unpermitted gas turbines polluting Black communities near Colossus 2 data center.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：OpenAI首款硬件曝光无屏AI伴侣音箱、GPT-5.6 Sol失控删文件安全危机蔓延
zh.summary: ⚡ Bloomberg曝OpenAI首款硬件为无屏AI伴侣音箱，可在家中移动，马达驱动组件增强人感；GPT-5.6 Sol文件删除危机持续升级，多名开发者数据库、生产环境文件被误删，四阶段过滤绕过机制引发Agent安全架构反思。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: OpenAI's First Hardware Revealed as Screenless Companion Speaker; GPT-5.6 Sol File Deletion Crisis Worsens
en.summary: ⚡ Bloomberg reveals OpenAI's first consumer device is a screenless AI companion speaker that moves around the home; GPT-5.6 Sol file deletion crisis worsens as multiple developers report databases and files wiped without authorization; four-stage filter bypass exposes fundamental AI agent security flaws.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：美国重启对伊海上封锁第四夜空袭、伊朗议会提交霍尔木兹法案、胡塞威胁封锁曼德海峡、参院民主党阻击国防授权法案
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军于20:00 GMT正式重启对伊朗港口海上封锁，第四轮空袭同步打击布什尔等地；伊朗议会提交霍尔木兹海峡战略管理法案，强硬回应美国“守护者”声明；胡塞武装威胁封锁曼德海峡，全球航运面临新威胁；美参院民主党罕见阻击国防授权法案抗议对伊战争；科威特海军舰艇遭伊朗击中4人受伤；挪威油轮在阿曼海岸遇袭；以色列安全内阁批准4.34亿美元新建34个定居点；黎以罗马谈判首日结束。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 International Politics Roundup: US Reimposes Iran Naval Blockade with 4th Night of Strikes, Iran Parliament Submits Hormuz Bill, Houthis Threaten Bab al-Mandeb, Senate Dems Block NDAA
en.summary: ⚡ US CENTCOM reimposes naval blockade on Iranian ports at 20:00 GMT; fourth wave of strikes hits Bushehr, Bandar Abbas; Iran parliament submits Hormuz Strategic Action Bill; Houthis threaten to close Bab al-Mandeb Strait; US Senate Democrats block NDAA debate over Iran war; Kuwait naval vessel struck, 4 wounded; Norwegian tanker hit off Oman; Israel approves 34M for 34 new West Bank settlements; Lebanon-Israel Rome talks conclude day one.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：CPI降温引爆反弹纳指涨0.9%、7月加息概率骤降至16%、SK海力士ADR暴涨27%领涨芯片、特朗普急转弯取消霍尔木兹过路费
zh.summary: ⚡ 美国6月CPI环比暴跌0.4%创六年来最大降幅，年率降至3.5%远低于预期；核心CPI月率录得0%为2021年以来最小增幅；7月加息概率从41.7%骤降至14.4%；美股三大指数全线收涨，纳指涨0.9%；SK海力士ADR暴涨27%领涨芯片板块；特朗普急转弯取消20%霍尔木兹过路费；美元指数回落至100.94；黄金反弹逼近4100美元。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Financial Roundup: CPI Cools Sharply, July Rate Hike Odds Plunge to 14%, SK Hynix ADR Surges 27%, Trump Reverses Hormuz Toll Plan
en.summary: ⚡ June CPI falls 0.4% MoM, biggest drop in 6 years; core CPI monthly rate hits 0% for first time since Jan 2021; July Fed hike probability collapses from 41.7% to 14.4%; US stocks rally with Nasdaq up 0.9%; SK Hynix ADR surges 27% leading chip rebound; Trump abruptly cancels 20% Hormuz transit fee; DXY falls to 100.94; gold rebounds toward $4,100.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：中国AI拟人监管新规正式施行豆包千问下线智能体、Grok Build偷代码马斯克承诺删除、美团开源LongCat-2.0
zh.summary: ⚡ 中国五部门联合发布AI拟人化互动监管新规今日正式施行，豆包/千问下线用户自定义智能体功能；SpaceXAI的Grok Build被曝偷偷上传完整Git仓库，马斯克48小时内承诺全部删除；美团正式开源LongCat-2.0，1.6T总参数专为智能体编程设计，同步开放国产卡推理代码。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: China AI Anthropomorphism Law Takes Effect, Musk Deletes Grok Build Data, Meituan Open-Sources LongCat-2.0
en.summary: ⚡ China's first AI anthropomorphism regulation takes effect today — Doubao and Qianwen remove user-created AI avatars; SpaceXAI's Grok Build caught uploading entire Git repos to cloud, Musk confirms full deletion within 48 hours; Meituan open-sources LongCat-2.0 with 1.6T parameters for agentic coding, including domestic GPU inference code.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：纽约州暂停大型数据中心建设、强化学习之父创办Oak Lab目标20瓦人脑级智能体、Anthropic发现Claude因语言不同价值观不同
zh.summary: ⚡ 纽约州全美首个暂停50MW以上数据中心建设，Hochul签署行政令影响超十多个项目；2024图灵奖得主Richard Sutton离开John Carmack创办Oak Lab，目标万亿参数20瓦功耗实时学习智能体；Anthropic研究显示Claude在20种语言中表达不同价值观，四轴模型解释15%差异。

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: NY Halts Large Data Centers, Turing Winner Sutton Founds Oak Lab, Anthropic Finds Claude's Values Shift by Language
en.summary: ⚡ New York becomes first US state to pause 50MW+ data center construction; 2024 Turing Award winner Richard Sutton leaves Carmack's Keen to launch Oak Lab, targeting trillion-parameter 20-watt real-time learning agents; Anthropic research reveals Claude expresses different value preferences across 20 languages, with 4-axis model explaining 15% of variation.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日国际政治综述：特朗普急转弯取消霍尔木兹20%过路费代之以投资、美伊第三晚空袭交火、胡塞武装四年后首袭沙特、阿联酋油轮被击1死8伤

en.title: ⚡ July 15 World Politics Roundup: Trump Reverses 20% Hormuz Toll, US-Iran Trade Strikes for 3rd Night, Houthis Break 4-Year Saudi Truce, UAE Tankers Hit (1 Dead)
en.summary: ⚡ Trump abruptly scraps 20% Hormuz shipping fee, replaces with Gulf investment deals; US CENTCOM launches 3rd consecutive night of strikes on six Iranian cities; Iran retaliates hitting US bases in Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait; Houthis fire missiles at Saudi Arabia for first time in 4 years; Two UAE tankers struck by Iranian cruise missiles, 1 Indian sailor killed; Trump announces national address on Iran.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日金融综述：6月CPI意外降温至3.5%创疫情来最大降幅、沃什国会首秀宣布三大工作组、五大行财报全线超预期高盛EPS翻倍、IBM业绩预警暴跌24%

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Financial Roundup: June CPI Cools to 3.5%, Warsh Debuts Three Task Forces, Big Bank Earnings Crush Estimates, IBM Plunges 24%
en.summary: ⚡ June CPI plunges 0.4% MoM, annual rate falls to 3.5% well below 3.8% expected; Fed Chair Warsh testifies before Congress, announces three internal task forces; Five major banks crush Q2 estimates, Goldman EPS doubles to $20.98; IBM crashes 24% on profit warning; Brent crude surges past $87 as Hormuz crisis deepens.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月15日科技综述：苹果起诉OpenAI窃密400人跳槽、DeepSeek 74亿美元融资估值破500亿、阶跃星辰发布全球首款AI手机

en.title: ⚡ July 15 Tech Roundup: Apple Sues OpenAI Over Trade Secrets Involving 400+ Employees, DeepSeek Raises $7.4B at $50B+ Valuation, Stepfun Debuts World's First AI-Native Phone
en.summary: ⚡ Apple files a 41-page lawsuit accusing OpenAI of systematic trade secret theft involving 400+ former Apple employees; DeepSeek closes $7.4B funding round at $50B+ valuation as founder Liang Wenfeng personally invests $3B; Stepfun launches STEPX Neo, the world's first LLM-native agentic smartphone with Step AOS operating system.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月14日科技综述：Spotify推出AI对话助手对抗Apple Music、OpenAI取消Sol五小时限制、苹果iOS 27公测版上线

en.title: ⚡ July 14 Tech Roundup: Spotify Launches ChatGPT-Like AI Music Assistant, OpenAI Removes Sol 5-Hour Cap, Apple iOS 27 Public Beta Goes Live
en.summary: ⚡ Spotify rolls out interactive AI music assistant for Premium users with voice and text conversation for music discovery; OpenAI temporarily removes GPT-5.6 Sol 5-hour usage cap after 48-hour demand surge, resets all user quotas; Apple releases public betas of iOS 27 and macOS 27 Golden Gate with fully rebuilt Siri AI available to non-developers.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月14日国际政治综述：匈牙利议会139:6罢免总统欧尔班时代落幕、以黎第六轮罗马谈判登场、美伊战火重燃油价飙破87美元

en.title: ⚡ July 14 World Politics Roundup: Hungary Ousts Orban-Era President in 139-6 Landslide, Israel-Lebanon Rome Talks Enter 6th Round, US-Iran Fighting Intensifies as Oil Breaks $87
en.summary: ⚡ Hungary parliament ousts President Tamas Sulyok in 139-6 vote as PM Magyar dismantles Orban-era power; Israel and Lebanon begin 6th round of US-mediated talks in Rome; US strikes Iran for 3rd night as Trump reinstates blockade with 20% Hormuz toll; Iranian missiles hit two UAE tankers killing 1 Indian sailor; EASA warns airlines to avoid Gulf airspace; Brent crude surges 5% to $87.49.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月14日金融综述：6月CPI环比跌0.4%创疫情来最大降幅，高盛Q2大超预期，沃什国会首秀登场
zh.summary: ⚡ 美国6月CPI环比下降0.4%为2020年4月以来最大单月降幅，能源价格暴跌5.7%为主要驱动；高盛Q2每股收益20.98美元远超预期14.47美元，SpaceX IPO提振投行业务；美联储主席沃什今日国会首秀，加息概率近50%市场高度关注；黄金跌破4000美元关口，原油飙升近10%后高位震荡。

en.title: ⚡ July 14 Financial Roundup: CPI Posts Biggest Drop Since April 2020, Goldman Beats by 44%, Warsh Testimony Looms
en.summary: ⚡ US June CPI falls 0.4% MoM — biggest decline since April 2020 — as energy prices plunge 5.7%; Goldman Sachs Q2 EPS of $20.98 crushes $14.47 consensus; Fed Chair Kevin Warsh delivers first congressional testimony today with rate hike odds nearing 50%; gold breaks below $4,000 as oil surges 9.6% on Hormuz tensions; Apple hits all-time high as capital rotates out of chip stocks.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月14日科技综述：英伟达砍掉超半数亚洲AI芯片客户/马来西亚出台出口许可新规/苹果股价创历史新高

en.summary: ⚡ Nvidia slashes authorized Asia AI chip customers by more than half, introduces whitelist system after compliance crackdown; Malaysia mandates strategic trade permits for US-origin AI chip exports; Jensen Huang to hold Beijing media briefing July 16; Apple stock hits all-time high above $321, market cap reaches $4.73 trillion.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月14日科技综述：苹果41页诉状怒告OpenAI窃密、200+经济学家签AI警告信、微软修复127个漏洞含蠕虫级0day

en.title: ⚡ July 14 Tech Roundup: Apple Sues OpenAI in 41-Page Trade Secret Bombshell, 200+ Experts Warn of AI Job Loss, Microsoft Patches 127 Flaws Including Wormable 0-Day

zh.title: ⚡ 7月14日国际政治综述：美军连续第三晚空袭伊朗、霍尔木兹海峡油轮遇袭1死8伤、特朗普重启封锁征收20%过路费

en.title: ⚡ July 14 World Politics Roundup: US Strikes Iran for 3rd Night, UAE Tankers Hit in Hormuz (1 Dead, 8 Injured), Trump Reimposes Blockade with 20% Cargo Toll
en.summary: ⚡ US strikes Iran for third consecutive night; Iran retaliates with cruise missiles on two UAE oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz, killing 1 Indian sailor and wounding 8; Trump reimposes naval blockade with 20% cargo toll; India summons Iranian diplomats; Bahrain sounds missile alerts; Brent crude surges past $85.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日国际政治综述：美军一周内第四轮打击伊朗、霍尔木兹海峡再关闭油价飙升、参议员格雷厄姆猝逝、巴黎森林大火失控
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军一周内第四次对伊朗发动打击，累计打击超300个军事目标；伊朗导弹袭击五国报复，宣布霍尔木兹海峡无限期关闭，布伦特原油飙升4.5%至79美元；特朗普亲密盟友、参议员林赛·格雷厄姆因主动脉夹层猝逝享年71岁；巴黎南部枫丹白露森林大火失控，800公顷过火，A6高速和TGV中断。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 World Politics Roundup: US Launches 4th Wave of Strikes on Iran, Hormuz Strait Re-Closed, Oil Surges 4.5%, Senator Graham Dies at 71, Paris Wildfire Burns 800 Hectares
en.summary: ⚡ US military launches 4th wave of strikes on Iran in a week, hitting 300+ targets; Iran retaliates with missile and drone attacks on five Gulf nations, declares Strait of Hormuz closed indefinitely, Brent crude surges 4.5% to $79; Senator Lindsey Graham, close Trump ally, dies suddenly at 71 from aortic dissection; Major wildfire in Fontainebleau forest near Paris burns 800 hectares, disrupting A6 highway and TGV rail lines.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日金融综述：韩国KOSPI暴跌9%创年内新低，欧洲接力下跌，美联储沃什国会首秀本周登场

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Financial Roundup: KOSPI Crashes 9% to New Low, Europe Slides, Fed Chair Warsh Debut Testimony Looms
en.summary: ⚡ Global markets hit by Black Monday: South Korea KOSPI plunges 9% as SK Hynix tanks 15%; European stocks slide; Brent crude holds above 9 on Hormuz closure fears; gold drops to ,060; Fed Chair Warsh testimony, CPI data, and Big 5 bank earnings converge this week.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日科技综述：黄仁勋路演粉碎Rubin Ultra延期传闻、台积电2nm量产谷歌首发、SK海力士称存储告别周期性
zh.summary: ⚡ 黄仁勋携英伟达高管全员出席摩根士丹利路演，正面否认Rubin Ultra延期传闻，季度营收逼近千亿美元增长加速；台积电2nm制程正式量产，谷歌Tensor G6抢得首发，Pixel 11八月发布；SK海力士董事长称存储不再是周期性行业，AI推理KV缓存需求持续爆发。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Tech Roundup: Jensen Huang Refutes Rubin Ultra Delay, TSMC 2nm Mass Production Begins, SK Hynix Says Memory Is No Longer Cyclical
en.summary: ⚡ Jensen Huang leads Nvidia roadshow at Morgan Stanley, denies Rubin Ultra delay rumors as quarterly revenue approaches $100B; TSMC 2nm enters mass production with Google Tensor G6 as first customer for Pixel 11; SK Hynix chairman declares memory no longer cyclical as AI KV caching demand reshapes market.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日国际政治综述：乌军一周击毁90艘俄船、特朗普情报转向、曼谷酒吧大火27死、美军首用自杀无人艇
zh.summary: ⚡ 乌克兰无人系统部队一周击毁90艘俄影子舰队船只，重创俄海上物流；特朗普阅情报后对乌立场180度转弯，同意授权乌生产爱国者导弹；曼谷Rong Beer酒吧大火27死63伤，紧急出口被啤酒箱和桌子堵塞酿惨剧；美军中央司令部首度投入自杀无人艇攻击伊朗，三天打击超300目标。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 World Politics Roundup: Ukraine Destroys 90 Russian Ships, Trump Shifts Stance, Bangkok Fire Kills 27, US Deploys Suicide Drones
en.summary: ⚡ Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces destroy 90 Russian shadow fleet vessels in a week; Trump shifts stance on Ukraine after intel briefing on drone strike effectiveness, authorizes Patriot production license; Bangkok bar fire kills 27 with blocked emergency exits; CENTCOM deploys one-way attack sea drones for first time against Iran, hitting 300+ targets in 3 nights.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日金融综述：布伦特原油飙至79美元韩国暴跌触发SIDECAR、黄金失守4100美元
zh.summary: ⚡ 美伊周末全面交火，布伦特原油周一亚市跳涨4.1%至79.11美元；韩国首尔综指暴跌5.4%触发SIDECAR机制，SK海力士盘中跌超8%；黄金跌破4100美元至4076美元，避险属性因加息预期强化而失灵；美元指数升至101.13，2年期美债收益率创2025年初以来新高；沃什周二国会首秀及CPI数据成本周焦点。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Financial Roundup: Brent Surges to $79, Korea Triggers SIDECAR, Gold Breaks Below $4,100
en.summary: ⚡ Brent crude surges 4.1% to $79.11 as US-Iran weekend strikes escalate; South Korea's KOSPI crashes 5.4% triggering SIDECAR circuit breaker; Gold drops 1.1% to $4,076 as inflation fears boost rate hike expectations; 2-year Treasury yield hits highest since early 2025; Fed Chair Warsh's first Congressional testimony and CPI data set to define the week ahead.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日科技综述：三星泰勒工厂量产特斯拉AI5芯片、苹果起诉OpenAI窃密、英伟达RTX Spark亮相BW2026、腾讯开源Hy3模型

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Tech Roundup: Samsung Taylor Fab Mass-Produces Tesla AI5 Chip, Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft, Nvidia RTX Spark Debuts at BW2026, Tencent Open-Sources Hy3
en.summary: ⚡ Samsung Taylor fab completes Tesla AI5 chip tape-out on 2nm process for mass production; Apple files federal lawsuit against OpenAI for trade secret theft, citing 400+ former employees; Nvidia RTX Spark superchip laptops debut at Bilibili World 2026, running 120B models locally; Tencent open-sources Hy3 295B MoE model under Apache 2.0, activating only 21B parameters per forward pass.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日科技综述：OpenAI GPT-5.6获安全绿灯全球全量上线、三大AI巨头引爆价格战、Meta Iris芯片9月投产
