en.title: ⚡ July 13 Tech Roundup: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Gets Government Greenlight for Global Launch, AI Giants Unleash Price War, Meta Iris Chip Set for September Production
en.summary: ⚡ OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna receives full US government greenlight for global rollout after security review; ChatGPT Work agent launched alongside; OpenAI, Meta, and SpaceXAI trigger industry-wide AI price war as enterprise token costs spiral; Meta Iris AI chip to begin production in September with 14GW computing capacity target by 2027, locking in Samsung/Sandisk/Sumitomo supply deals.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日国际政治综述：特朗普确认援乌爱国者导弹大转向、美军对伊朗发动新一轮打击、南海仲裁十周年14国重申裁决
zh.summary: ⚡ 特朗普确认向乌克兰提供爱国者防空系统和进攻性武器，美对乌政策重大转向；美军对伊朗发动新一轮打击，伊朗称外交努力'化为徒劳'；伊朗报纸公布13名外国领导人'复仇名单'；乌克兰一周打击90艘俄影子舰队船只；南海仲裁十周年14国+欧盟重申裁决具法律约束力。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Geopolitics Roundup: Trump Pivots to Arm Ukraine with Patriots, US Launches Fresh Iran Strikes, 14 Nations Reaffirm South China Sea Ruling
en.summary: ⚡ Trump confirms Patriots and offensive weapons for Ukraine in major policy shift; US launches fresh wave of strikes on Iran as Tehran says diplomacy 'rendered futile'; Iranian newspaper publishes revenge list of 13 foreign leaders; Ukraine strikes 90 Russian shadow fleet vessels in one week; 14 nations + EU reaffirm 2016 South China Sea ruling on 10th anniversary.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日金融综述：油价飙升3%霍尔木兹海峡关闭、SK海力士韩国股价暴跌6%、金价跌破4100美元、沃什任命King和Andreessen改革美联储
zh.summary: ⚡ 亚市早盘布伦特原油飙升4.5%至78.69美元，伊朗革命卫队宣布无限期关闭霍尔木兹海峡；SK海力士纳市募资265亿创纪录，韩国本土股价反跌6.6%套利盘涌出；黄金跌至4070美元避险功能失灵，9月加息概率升至69%；美联储主席沃什任命前英央行行长默文·金和Marc Andreessen领导五大新工作组改革美联储；日本1.8万亿GPIF拟增配国内资产。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Financial Roundup: Oil Surges 3% on Hormuz Closure, SK Hynix Korea Stock Plunges 6%, Gold Drops Below $4,100, Warsh Reshapes Fed with King and Andreessen
en.summary: ⚡ Brent crude surges 4.5% to $78.69 as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz indefinitely; SK Hynix shares tumble 6.6% in Korea despite record $26.5B Nasdaq debut; gold sinks to $4,070 as rate hike fears override safe-haven demand; Fed Chair Warsh appoints former BOE Governor Mervyn King and Marc Andreessen to lead five new task forces reshaping Fed policy; Japan's $1.8T GPIF to boost domestic and alternative assets.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日AI芯片综述：韩国央行确认AI半导体超级周期未见顶、釜山半导体论坛今日开幕、SK海力士CEO预警2027年最严重缺货
zh.summary: ⚡ 韩国央行正式确认AI驱动的半导体超级周期未现见顶信号，HBM定制化生产限制供应增长，市场将持续扩张；韩国MSIT半导体成果交流会在釜山开幕，800人参加，英伟达韩国CEO发表主题演讲；SK海力士CEO警告2027年将出现行业史上最严重缺货，HBM4价格明年翻倍；野村认为AI存储担忧被夸大；三星eSSD进入英伟达Vera Rubin供应链。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 AI Chip Roundup: Bank of Korea Confirms Semiconductor Supercycle Has Not Peaked, Busan Forum Opens with 800 Experts, SK Hynix CEO Warns of Worst Shortage in 2027
en.summary: ⚡ Bank of Korea officially confirms the AI-driven semiconductor supercycle has not peaked, with HBM customization constraining supply; MSIT semiconductor forum opens in Busan with 800 attendees and NVIDIA Korea CEO keynote; SK Hynix CEO warns 2027 will bring worst memory shortage in history as HBM4 prices are expected to double; Nomura says AI memory concerns overdone; Samsung expands Vera Rubin supply chain from HBM to eSSD.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日科技综述：Netflix签约Vogue/BuzzFeed对抗YouTube、Google发布Gemini 3.5同声传译、全美AI数据中心社区抗争升级
zh.summary: ⚡ Netflix签约六大出版商内容库8月上线对抗YouTube，YouTube占据全美电视时长13.4%领先Netflix近2:1；Google发布Gemini 3.5 Live Translate同声传译模型，流式处理70+语言保留语调；全美AI数据中心社区抗议Q1阻挠1300亿美元项目，活跃反对团体从396增至833覆盖49州。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Tech Roundup: Netflix Signs Vogue & BuzzFeed to Battle YouTube, Google Debuts Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, US Communities Block $130B in AI Data Centers
en.summary: ⚡ Netflix signs content deals with 6 major publishers for August 3 launch to challenge YouTube's 13.4% US TV share; Google releases Gemini 3.5 Live Translate with streaming 70+ language support; US communities block $130B in AI data center projects in Q1 as opposition groups surge from 396 to 833 across 49 states.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日国际政治快讯：美军连夜再袭伊朗格什姆岛、卫星确认IRGC基地严重受损、伊拉克总理今日访美签石油协议
zh.summary: ⚡ 美军对伊朗格什姆岛发动新一轮打击，卫星图像证实IRGC海军基地机库、码头遭严重破坏；伊朗称8名军人死亡、1名通讯工人丧生；科威特边境哨所和海上平台遭袭；伊拉克总理今日访华盛顿签石油天然气协议以减少对霍尔木兹海峡依赖；UN秘书长呼吁立即停火。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Geopolitics Update: US Launches Fresh Overnight Strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island, Satellite Confirms IRGC Naval Base Severely Damaged, Iraqi PM Visits Washington for Oil Deals
en.summary: ⚡ CENTCOM launches fresh strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island targeting missile systems; Sentinel-2 satellite imagery confirms IRGC Navy base hangars, piers, and shiplift dock severely damaged; Iran reports 8 military personnel killed, 1 telecom worker dead; Kuwait border posts and offshore oil platform attacked; Iraqi PM Al-Zaidi visits Washington today for oil & gas deals to reduce Hormuz dependency; UN chief Guterres urges immediate ceasefire.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日金融综述：JPMorgan正式转空数字资产、高盛警告CPI为最大风险、欧央行Nagel暗示加息、MicroStrategy股价暴跌70%
zh.summary: ⚡ JPMorgan正式转空数字资产，建议MicroStrategy重建美元储备；高盛警告6月CPI为美股最大短期风险，期权市场押注标普0.8%波动；标准 Chartered要求Saylor澄清 Treasury 转向，MicroStrategy股价从高点暴跌70%；欧央行Nagel称伊朗冲突若推高通胀将考虑加息。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Financial Roundup: JPMorgan Turns Bearish on Crypto, Goldman Flags CPI as Key Risk, ECB's Nagel Hints at Rate Hike, MicroStrategy Stock Craters 70%
en.summary: ⚡ JPMorgan officially shifts to 'cautious' on digital assets, advising MicroStrategy to rebuild dollar reserves; Goldman flags June CPI as the most consequential near-term variable for US equities; Standard Chartered urges Saylor to clarify treasury pivot as MicroStrategy stock plunges 70% from highs; ECB's Nagel signals rate hike if Iran conflict intensifies price pressures.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日科技综述：高通拟80亿美元收购Tenstorrent挑战英伟达、SpaceX提交750亿IPO招股书星舰V3首飞成功、微软创纪录修复200+漏洞
zh.summary: ⚡ 高通正就80-100亿美元收购Tenstorrent进行早期谈判，有望挑战英伟达AI芯片霸主地位；SpaceX正式提交750亿美元IPO招股书，星舰V3首飞成功，第13次试飞定于7月16日；微软7月Patch Tuesday修复200+漏洞创纪录，AI驱动的漏洞发现正重塑安全格局；Grok Build CLI被曝完整上传代码仓库至xAI服务器引发安全争议。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Tech Roundup: Qualcomm Eyes $8-10B Tenstorrent Acquisition, SpaceX Files $75B IPO with Starship V3 Success, Microsoft Patches Record 200+ Vulnerabilities
en.summary: ⚡ Qualcomm in early talks to acquire Jim Keller's Tenstorrent for $8-10B in a bid to challenge Nvidia's AI chip dominance; SpaceX files $75B IPO, completes Starship V3 maiden flight, IFT-13 set for July 16 with Starlink V3 satellites; Microsoft's July Patch Tuesday fixes record 200+ vulnerabilities as AI-driven discovery reshapes security; Grok Build CLI caught uploading entire repos to xAI servers.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日科技综述：英国将四大云巨头列为关键第三方、阶跃星辰今晚发布AI手机、Anthropic提交IPO招股书
zh.summary: 英国正式将微软、谷歌云、AWS和Oracle列为金融系统关键第三方，监管今日生效；阶跃星辰今晚19:00举办战略发布会，有望推出首款AI智能体手机；Anthropic秘密提交IPO招股书估值近万亿美元；Apple诉OpenAI案持续发酵。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Tech Roundup: UK Designates Four Cloud Giants as Critical Infrastructure, StepFun to Launch AI Phone Tonight, Anthropic Files for IPO
en.summary: UK formally designates Microsoft, Google Cloud, AWS, and Oracle as Critical Third Parties to the financial system, oversight begins today; Chinese AI startup StepFun to unveil its first AI agent smartphone tonight at 19:00 Beijing time; Anthropic secretly files S-1 for IPO approaching $1T valuation; Apple v. OpenAI lawsuit continues to unfold.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日国际政治综述：美伊全面开火140目标遭袭、霍尔木兹海峡关闭、特朗普转向援乌爱国者
zh.summary: 美军一周内第三轮大规模空袭伊朗约140个军事目标；伊朗革命卫队宣布无限期关闭霍尔木兹海峡并向五个海湾国家发射导弹和无人机；特朗普确认将向乌克兰提供爱国者防空系统和进攻性武器，北约秘书长将于7月14日访美。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 World Politics Roundup: US-Iran All-Out Clash — 140 Targets Hit, Hormuz Closed, Trump Pivots to Arm Ukraine with Patriots
en.summary: US CENTCOM launches third wave of airstrikes hitting approximately 140 Iranian targets; IRGC closes Strait of Hormuz indefinitely and strikes five Gulf nations; Trump confirms Patriot systems and offensive weapons for Ukraine; NATO chief to visit Washington July 14.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月13日金融市场周报：CPI+银行财报+沃什听证会三重考验、保证金债务创纪录、美联储CBDC禁令生效
zh.summary: ⚡ 本周美股面临CPI数据发布、银行财报季开启、美联储主席沃什国会首秀三重考验；美国保证金债务飙至1.42万亿美元创纪录，杠杆水平堪比2000年互联网泡沫；美联储CBDC禁令正式生效利好稳定币；美联储半年度报告显示PCE通胀从2.5%飙至4.1%。

en.title: ⚡ July 13 Market Preview: Triple Test of CPI, Bank Earnings, Warsh Testimony; Record Margin Debt; CBDC Ban Becomes Law
en.summary: ⚡ U.S. markets face a triple test this week: June CPI data Tuesday, Q2 earnings season kickoff with JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs, and Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's first congressional testimony. Margin debt hits record $1.42 trillion matching dot-com bubble levels. Fed CBDC ban becomes law, boosting stablecoin issuers.

zh.title: ⚡ 中东全面升级：美军空袭伊朗140目标、伊朗反击五国关闭海峡
zh.summary: 美国CENTCOM对伊朗发动第三轮大规模空袭，打击140个军事目标；伊朗革命卫队宣布关闭霍尔木兹海峡并向五个海湾国家发射导弹和无人机；特朗普称"我们狠狠打击了他们"；阿曼正式抗议伊朗侵犯领土主权；卡塔尔3人受伤其中包括儿童；印度11名船员中1人失踪。

en.title: ⚡ Middle East Escalates: US Strikes 140 Iranian Targets, Iran Retaliates Against 5 Nations, Closes Hormuz
en.summary: CENTCOM launches third and largest wave of strikes hitting ~140 Iranian military targets; Iran's Revolutionary Guard retaliates by closing the Strait of Hormuz and striking five Gulf states with missiles and drones; Trump says 'we hit them very hard'; Qatar reports 3 wounded including a child; 1 Indian crew member missing after container ship hit; Oman files formal protest.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月12日23点科技快讯：以太坊AI安全智能体发现关键漏洞、阿里巴巴XQUIC库被曝无补丁远程崩溃、TypeScript 7.0用Go重写编译器
zh.summary: 以太坊基金会AI安全智能体发现libp2p Gossipsub远程崩溃漏洞CVE-2026-34219，保护4000万枚ETH质押安全；阿里巴巴XQUIC库被曝XRING漏洞，260字节合法流量即可远程崩溃服务器且无官方补丁；微软TypeScript 7.0正式发布，编译器用Go重写，VS Code构建从125秒降至10.6秒。

en.title: ⚡ July 12 Evening Tech: Ethereum AI Agents Find Critical Gossipsub Bug, Alibaba XQUIC Library Has Unpatched Remote Crash, TypeScript 7.0 Ships Go-Native Compiler
en.summary: Ethereum Foundation's AI security agents discover CVE-2026-34219 in libp2p gossipsub, a remotely triggerable crash that could take validators offline, protecting $72B in staked ETH; Alibaba's XQUIC HTTP/3 library hit by XRING flaw — 260 bytes of legal traffic crashes the server, no patch available; Microsoft ships TypeScript 7.0 with Go-rewritten compiler delivering 10x faster builds.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月12日22点国际政治快讯：以色列炮击南黎巴嫩违反停火、特朗普称海峡仍开放、伊朗称海峡胜过核弹、泽连斯基撤换总理
zh.summary: ⚡ 以色列炮击黎巴嫩南部Zawtar al-Sharqiyah村，违反刚签署的美伊黎停火框架；以色列无人机袭击加沙城致4死；特朗普接受NBC采访称霍尔木兹海峡仍对商业航运开放，CENTCOM强调"伊朗不控制海峡"；伊朗最高领袖顾问称海峡重要性"胜过数十枚原子弹"；泽连斯基宣布内阁改组，撤换总理Svyrydenko。

en.title: ⚡ July 12 World Politics Roundup: Israel Shells South Lebanon Breaking Ceasefire, Trump Says Hormuz Open, Iran Calls Strait 'More Important Than Nukes', Zelenskyy Replaces PM
en.summary: ⚡ Israel shells Zawtar al-Sharqiyah in southern Lebanon violating ceasefire framework; Israeli drone strike kills 4 in Gaza City; Trump tells NBC Hormuz is open to commercial traffic, CENTCOM says 'Iran does not control the strait'; Iran supreme leader advisor says Hormuz 'more important than dozens of atomic bombs'; Zelenskyy announces cabinet reshuffle, replacing PM Yulia Svyrydenko.

zh.title: ⚡ 金价避险失灵停滞4100美元、9月加息概率首超50%、摩根士丹利警告"夏季反弹"三大风险
zh.summary: 黄金在美伊冲突升级中反跌至4120美元，9月加息概率首次突破50%；摩根士丹利列出三大风险：伊朗战事重启、美联储加息、AI资本开支降温；10年期美债收益率升至4.56%，30年期突破5%；下周CPI数据和沃什国会听证会成为市场焦点，Q2财报季以银行业拉开序幕。

en.title: ⚡ Gold Defies Geopolitics, Stalls at $4,120; September Rate Hike Odds Cross 50%; Morgan Stanley Flags 3 Risks to Summer Rally
en.summary: Gold slides to $4,120 despite escalating US-Iran conflict as oil-driven inflation fears push September rate hike odds above 50% for the first time. Morgan Stanley flags 3 risks: Iran war restart, Fed hike, AI capex slowdown. 10-year yield at 4.56%, 30-year above 5%. CPI data and Kevin Warsh's congressional testimony next week in focus. Q2 earnings season kicks off with major bank results.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月12日国际政治快讯：阿曼罕见召见伊朗大使抗议、卡塔尔含儿童3人受伤称遭袭期间不充当调解人、美军宣布海峡南线仍通行自由
zh.summary: 伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡进入第3天，最新动态：阿曼罕见召见伊朗大使递交抗议照会，谴责伊朗无人机袭击其领土；卡塔尔3人受伤含一名儿童，多哈称遭袭期间不充当调解人；美军中央司令部完成本周第三轮打击累计300+目标；伊朗议长警告"单方面协议时代已结束"；伊拉克总理周一访美商讨能源协议。

en.title: ⚡ July 12 World Politics: Oman Summons Iranian Ambassador in Unprecedented Protest, Qatar Reports 3 Injured Including Child, CENTCOM Declares Southern Route Open for Free Navigation
en.summary: Day 3 of the Iran-Hormuz crisis: Oman issues rare formal protest to Iranian ambassador after drone strikes on its territory; Qatar says 3 injured including a child, warns it won't mediate while under attack; CENTCOM completes third round of strikes hitting 300+ targets this week; Iran's Parliament Speaker warns 'era of one-sided deals is OVER'; Iraq PM to visit Washington Monday for energy talks.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月12日金融快讯：伊朗导弹袭击美军多基地致暗盘油价大涨2.5%、美银发出"全员做多"危险信号、全球步入"动荡之夏"
zh.summary: 伊朗革命卫队第三阶段报复打击美军在阿曼、卡塔尔、科威特、巴林、约旦多处基地，霍尔木兹海峡无限期关闭，布伦特原油暗盘大涨2.5%+；美银牛熊指标持续位于9.5极度乐观区间发出卖出信号；日元兑美元跌破162创40年新低；全球市场脆弱度指标飙至0.9，二季度财报季24%盈利预期面临考验。

en.title: ⚡ July 12 Financial Update: Iran Missile Strikes on Multiple US Bases Send Oil Surging 2.5%+ in Dark Trading, BofA Warns 'Everyone Long' Signals Danger, Global Markets Enter 'Turbulent Summer'
en.summary: Iran's IRGC launches third-wave retaliation striking US bases in Oman, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan; Strait of Hormuz closed indefinitely; Brent crude dark trading surges 2.5%+; BofA Bull & Bear Indicator holds at 9.5 extreme optimism flashing sell signal; Yen breaks 162 vs USD hitting 40-year low; UBS fragility gauge at 0.9 near all-time high; Q2 earnings season opens with 24% growth expectations.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月12日20点科技快讯：Oratomic获3亿美元打造20K量子比特容错计算机、Chrome 150紧急修复已遭利用零日漏洞、Hugging Face推出内核签名机制抗供应链攻击
zh.summary: Oratomic完成3亿美元A轮融资，仅需2万量子比特即可构建容错量子计算机；Google紧急发布Chrome 150修复已遭利用的零日漏洞CVE-2026-14418；Hugging Face推出GPU内核签名机制，用Sigstore防供应链攻击。

en.title: ⚡ July 12 Evening Tech: Oratomic Raises $300M for 20K-Qubit Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computer, Google Patches Chrome 150 Zero-Day Exploited in the Wild, Hugging Face Signs GPU Kernels Against Supply Chain Attacks
en.summary: Oratomic closes $300M Series A claiming fault-tolerant quantum computing with just 20K qubits; Google ships urgent Chrome 150.0.7871.46 to patch CVE-2026-14418 exploited in the wild; Hugging Face introduces Sigstore-based kernel signing for GPU kernel supply chain security.

zh.title: ⚡ GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra 一小时攻克50年数学难题、字节跳动发布中国首个AI IDE、Google Magic Pointer 和 Meta 暂停AI图像
zh.summary: OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra 在不到一小时内证明了已有 50 年历史的循环双覆盖猜想；字节跳动发布中国首个 AI IDE Trae 国内版，配置豆包 1.5pro；Google 为 Googlebook 电脑推出 Magic Pointer AI 应用；Meta 暂停 Instagram AI 图像生成功能。

en.title: ⚡ GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra Solves 50-Year Math Problem in 1 Hour, ByteDance Launches China's First AI IDE, Google Magic Pointer & Meta Halts AI Image Feature
en.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra proves the 50-year-old Cycle Double Cover Conjecture in under an hour using 64 parallel subagents; ByteDance releases China's first AI-native IDE Trae domestic edition with Doubao 1.5pro; Google unveils Magic Pointer AI app for upcoming Googlebook computers; Meta suspends Instagram AI image generation amid privacy backlash.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月12日国际政治快讯：伊朗巡航导弹击中货船、海峡再关闭、美伊停火协议实质瓦解
zh.summary: 伊朗革命卫队海军发射巡航导弹击中塞浦路斯籍货船M/V GFS Galaxy，宣布海峡无限期关闭；CENTCOM第三轮打击伊朗140个军事目标；特朗普宣布停火已死；印度10船员获救1人失踪；阿曼提出两通道提案遭伊朗搁置。美伊六月谅解备忘录实质性瓦解。

en.title: ⚡ July 12 World Politics: Iran Fires Cruise Missile at Cargo Ship, Strait of Hormuz Re-Closed, US-Iran Ceasefire Effectively Collapses
en.summary: IRGC Navy fires cruise missile at M/V GFS Galaxy, declares Strait of Hormuz closed indefinitely; CENTCOM completes third round of strikes hitting 140 Iranian targets; Trump declares ceasefire over; 10 Indian crew rescued, 1 missing; Oman's two-lane proposal stalled; June MoU effectively dismantled.

zh.title: ⚡ 7月12日国际政治快讯：美军第三轮打击伊朗140目标、伊朗反击5海湾国、参议员格雷厄姆突发去世、南海仲裁十周年14国联合声明
zh.summary: 美军第三轮打击伊朗140个目标，伊朗反击海湾五国致卡塔尔3人受伤；特朗普重要盟友、参议员林赛·格雷厄姆心脏病突发去世，享年71岁；南海仲裁十周年，14国+欧盟重申裁决效力，中国重申"不接受不承认"。

en.title: ⚡ July 12 World Politics Update: US Third Wave Hits 140 Iranian Targets, Iran Strikes Back Across 5 Gulf States, Senator Lindsey Graham Dies Suddenly, 14 Nations Reaffirm 2016 South China Sea Ruling
en.summary: US CENTCOM completes third wave strikes hitting 140 Iranian targets; Iran retaliates against Qatar, UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, and Jordan — 3 wounded in Qatar; US Sen.
